```text
240	    /**
241	     * 创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVar方法
242	     *
243	     * @param left  变量的最小值
244	     * @param right 变量的最大值
245	     * @param name  变量名称
246	     * @return 创建的整数变量
247	     */
248	    public IntVar newIntVar(final long left, final long right, final String name) {
249	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVar(left, right, name);
250	        registerVariables(tv, name);
251	        trackVariable(tv, left, right, name);
252	        log.info("Variable created: {} in [{}, {}]", name, left, right);
253	        return tv;
254	    }
255	
256	    /**
257	     * 从单个值创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
258	     *
259	     * @param value 变量的固定值
260	     * @param name  变量名称
261	     * @return 创建的整数变量
262	     */
263	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long value, final String name) {
264	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(new long[] { value }), name);
265	        registerVariables(tv, name);
266	        trackVariable(tv, value, value, name);
267	        log.info("Variable created: {} = {}", name, value);
268	        return tv;
269	    }
270	
271	    /**
272	     * 从多个值创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
273	     *
274	     * @param values 变量的可能值数组
275	     * @param name   变量名称
276	     * @return 创建的整数变量
277	     */
278	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long[] values, final String name) {
279	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(values), name);
280	        registerVariables(tv, name);
281	        trackVariable(tv, values[0], values[values.length - 1], name);
282	        log.info("Variable created: {} in domain {}", name, java.util.Arrays.toString(values));
283	        return tv;
284	    }
285	
286	    /**
287	     * 从区间创建整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
288	     *
289	     * @param intervals 变量的区间范围数组
290	     * @param name      变量名称
291	     * @return 创建的整数变量
292	     */
293	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final long[][] intervals, final String name) {
294	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromIntervals(intervals), name);
295	        registerVariables(tv, name);
296	        trackVariable(tv, intervals[0][0], intervals[intervals.length - 1][1], name);
297	        log.info("Variable created: {} in intervals {}", name, java.util.Arrays.deepToString(intervals));
298	        return tv;
299	    }
300	
301	    /**
302	     * 创建具有完整域的整数变量，封装CpModel的newIntVarFromDomain方法
303	     *
304	     * @param name 变量名称
305	     * @return 创建的整数变量
306	     */
307	    public IntVar newIntVarFromDomain(final String name) {
308	        IntVar tv = this.cpModel.newIntVarFromDomain(Domain.fromValues(new long[] { Long.MIN_VALUE, Long.MAX_VALUE }),
309	                name);
310	        registerVariables(tv, name);
311	        trackVariable(tv, Long.MIN_VALUE, Long.MAX_VALUE, name);
312	        log.info("Variable created: {} in full domain", name);
313	        return tv;
314	    }
315	
316	    /**
317	     * 创建布尔变量，封装CpModel的newBoolVar方法
318	     *
319	     * @param name 变量名称
320	     * @return 创建的布尔变量
321	     */
322	    public BoolVar newBoolVar(final String name) {
323	        BoolVar tv = this.cpModel.newBoolVar(name);
324	        registerVariablesBool(tv, name);
325	        trackVariable(tv, 0, 1, name);
326	        log.info("BoolVar created: {} in {0, 1}", name);
327	        return tv;
328	    }
329	
330	    /**
331	     * 注册其他变量
332	     * 
333	     * @param tv   变量对象
334	     * @param name 变量名称
335	     */
336	    private void registerVariables(final IntVar tv, final String name) {
337	        // 判断是否已经存在，如果已经存在，则抛异常
338	        if (otherVarMap.containsKey(name)) {
339	            log.error("Variable already exists: {}", name);
340	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Variable already exists: " + name);
341	        }
342	
343	        // name不是以ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX 且
344	        // PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX开头，则添加到otherVarMap
345	        if (!name.startsWith(ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX) && !name.startsWith(PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX)) {
346	            OtherVar otherVar = new OtherVar();
347	            otherVar.setCode(name);
348	            otherVar.setVar(tv);
349	            otherVar.setShortCode("o" + (++otherVarIndex));
350	            otherVarMap.put(name, otherVar);
351	        }
352	    }
353	
354	    /**
355	     * 注册其他变量 - BoolVar版本
356	     *
357	     * @param tv   变量对象
358	     * @param name 变量名称
359	     */
360	    private void registerVariablesBool(final BoolVar tv, final String name) {
361	        registerVariables(tv, name);
362	    }
363	
364	    /**
365	     * 跟踪变量创建信息
366	     *
367	     * @param var  变量对象
368	     * @param lb   下界
369	     * @param ub   上界
370	     * @param name 变量名称
371	     */
372	    private void trackVariable(IntVar var, long lb, long ub, String name) {
373	        variables.put(name, var);
374	        variableLogs.add(String.format("%s in [%d, %d]", name, lb, ub));
375	    }
376	
377	    /**
378	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（LinearArgument约束）
379	     *
380	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
381	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
382	     * @param rightValue     右侧值
383	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
384	     * @param operator       操作符
385	     * @return 包装的约束对象
386	     */
387	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr, long rightValue,
388	            String constraintName, String operator) {
389	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
390	        algCt.setLeft(toNameString(leftExpr));
391	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
392	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
393	        constraints.add(algCt);
394	        return algCt;
395	    }
396	
397	    /**
398	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（AlgCPLinearExpr约束）
399	     *
400	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
401	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
402	     * @param rightValue     右侧值
403	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
404	     * @param operator       操作符
405	     * @return 包装的约束对象
406	     */
407	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, AlgCPLinearExpr leftExpr, long rightValue,
408	            String constraintName, String operator) {
409	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
410	        algCt.setLeft(leftExpr.toString());
411	        algCt.setLeftName(leftExpr.getName());
412	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
413	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
414	        constraints.add(algCt);
415	        return algCt;
416	    }
417	
418	    /**
419	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（两个LinearArgument约束）
420	     *
421	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
422	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
423	     * @param rightExpr      右侧表达式
424	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
425	     * @param operator       操作符
426	     * @return 包装的约束对象
427	     */
428	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr,
429	            LinearArgument rightExpr,
430	            String constraintName, String operator) {
431	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
432	        algCt.setLeft(toNameString(leftExpr));
433	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
434	        algCt.setRight(toNameString(rightExpr));
435	        constraints.add(algCt);
436	        return algCt;
437	    }
438	
439	    /**
440	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（LinearArgument和AlgCPLinearExpr约束）
441	     *
442	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
443	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
444	     * @param rightExpr      右侧表达式
445	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
446	     * @param operator       操作符
447	     * @return 包装的约束对象
448	     */
449	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr,
450	            AlgCPLinearExpr rightExpr,
451	            String constraintName, String operator) {
452	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
453	        algCt.setLeft(toNameString(leftExpr));
454	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
455	        algCt.setRight(rightExpr.toString());
456	        algCt.setRightName(rightExpr.getName());
457	        constraints.add(algCt);
458	        return algCt;
459	    }
460	
461	    /**
462	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（AlgCPLinearExpr和LinearArgument约束）
463	     *
464	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
465	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
466	     * @param rightExpr      右侧表达式
467	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
468	     * @param operator       操作符
469	     * @return 包装的约束对象
470	     */
471	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, AlgCPLinearExpr leftExpr,
472	            LinearArgument rightExpr,
473	            String constraintName, String operator) {
474	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
475	        algCt.setLeft(leftExpr.toString());
476	        algCt.setLeftName(leftExpr.getName());
477	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
478	        algCt.setRight(toNameString(rightExpr));
479	        constraints.add(algCt);
480	        return algCt;
481	    }
482	
483	    /**
484	     * 创建并记录布尔约束的辅助方法
485	     *
486	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
487	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
488	     * @return 包装的约束对象
489	     */
490	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackBoolConstraint(Constraint constraint, String constraintName) {
491	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
492	        constraints.add(algCt);
493	        return algCt;
494	    }
495	
496	    /**
497	     * 将LinearArgument转换为名称字符串
498	     *
499	     * @param expr LinearArgument表达式
500	     * @return 名称字符串
501	     */
502	    public static String toNameString(LinearArgument expr) {
503	        if (expr instanceof IntVar) {
504	            return ((IntVar) expr).getName();
505	        } else if (expr instanceof BoolVar) {
506	            return ((BoolVar) expr).getName();
507	        } else {
508	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported linear argument type: " + expr.getClass().getName());
509	        }
510	    }
511	
512	    // 以下方法直接委托给底层的CpModel，保持接口兼容性
513	    // Boolean Constraints
514	
515	    /**
516	     * 添加布尔或约束，至少有一个字面量为真
517	     *
518	     * @param literals 字面量数组
519	     * @return 添加的约束
520	     */
521	    public AlgCPConstraint addBoolOr(final Literal[] literals) {
522	        Constraint ct = cpModel.addBoolOr(literals);
523	        return createAndTrackBoolConstraint(ct, "addBoolOr");
524	    }
525	
526	    /**
527	     * 添加布尔或约束，至少有一个字面量为真
528	     *
529	     * @param literals 字面量集合
530	     * @return 添加的约束
531	     */
532	    public AlgCPConstraint addBoolOr(final Iterable<Literal> literals) {
533	        Constraint ct = cpModel.addBoolOr(literals);
534	        return createAndTrackBoolConstraint(ct, "addBoolOr");
535	    }
536	
537	    /**
538	     * 添加至少一个约束，等价于addBoolOr
539	     *
540	     * @param literals 字面量数组
541	     * @return 添加的约束
542	     */
543	    public AlgCPConstraint addAtLeastOne(final Literal[] literals) {
544	        Constraint ct = cpModel.addAtLeastOne(literals);
545	        return createAndTrackBoolConstraint(ct, "addAtLeastOne");
546	    }
547	
548	    /**
549	     * 添加至少一个约束，等价于addBoolOr
550	     *
551	     * @param literals 字面量集合
552	     * @return 添加的约束
553	     */
554	    public AlgCPConstraint addAtLeastOne(final Iterable<Literal> literals) {
555	        Constraint ct = cpModel.addAtLeastOne(literals);
556	        return createAndTrackBoolConstraint(ct, "addAtLeastOne");

1053	    // Objective methods
1054	    /**
1055	     * 添加双精度线性表达式的最小化目标
1056	     *
1057	     * @param expr 双精度线性表达式
1058	     */
1059	    public void minimize(AlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
1060	        cpModel.minimize(expr.build());
1061	        addVirutalAlgCPConstraint("minimize", expr);
1062	    }
1063	
1064	    /**
1065	     * 添加双精度线性表达式的最大化目标
1066	     *
1067	     * @param expr 双精度线性表达式
1068	     */
1069	    public void maximize(AlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
1070	        cpModel.minimize(expr.build());
1071	        addVirutalAlgCPConstraint("maximize", expr);
1072	    }
1073	
1074	    private AlgCPConstraint addVirutalAlgCPConstraint(String name, AlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
1075	        AlgCPConstraint ct = new AlgCPConstraint(null, this.currentRelaxVar, this.currentRelaxVarName);
1076	        ct.setName(name);
1077	        ct.setLeft(expr.toString());
1078	        ct.setLeftName(expr.getName());
1079	        this.objectExpr = expr;
1080	        constraints.add(ct);
1081	        return ct;
1082	    }
1083

1095	     */
1096	    public boolean hasObjective() {
1097	        return cpModel.hasObjective();
1098	    }

1116	
1117	    /**
1118	     * 打印模型摘要
1119	     */
1120	    public void printModelSummary() {
1121	        log.info("\n" + "=".repeat(80));
1122	        log.info("CP-SAT MODEL SUMMARY");
1123	        log.info("=".repeat(80));
1124	
1125	        log.info("\nVARIABLES ({}):", variables.size());
1126	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1127	        for (int i = 0; i < variableLogs.size(); i++) {
1128	            log.info(String.format("%3d. %s", i + 1, variableLogs.get(i)));
1129	        }
1130	
1131	        log.info("\nCONSTRAINTS ({}):", constraints.size());
1132	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1133	        for (int i = 0; i < constraints.size(); i++) {
1134	            log.info(String.format("%3d. %s", i + 1, constraints.get(i).toString()));
1135	        }
1136	        log.info("\n" + "=".repeat(80));
1137	
1138	        log.info("\nObjectFuntionDetail: ");
1139	        if (objectExpr != null) {
1140	            log.info(objectExpr.toDetailString());
1141	        } else {
1142	            log.info("null");
1143	        }
1144	        log.info("\n" + "=".repeat(80));
1145	
1146	    }
1147	
1148	    public void printRunValue(CpSolver cpSolver, CpSolverStatus status) {
1149	        log.info("\nCpSolverStatus:{} ", status);
1150	        if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
1151	            return;
1152	        }
1153	        log.info("\nVARIABLE VALUES ({}):", variables.size());
1154	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1155	        for (IntVar var : variables.values()) {
1156	            long value = cpSolver.value(var);
1157	            log.info(String.format("  %-20s = %d", var.getName(), value));
1158	        }
1159	        if (status == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || status == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
1160	            log.info("\nObject Value ={}", cpSolver.objectiveValue());
1161	        } else {
1162	            log.info("\nObject Value ={}", "not");
1163	        }
1164	
1165	        log.info("-".repeat(80));
1166	    }
1167	}
1168
```

```text
40	/**
41	 * 模块算法实现类
42	 * 实现ConstraintAlg接口，提供约束求解的具体实现
43	 * 继承自ModuleBaseAlgImpl，支持模块级别和部件分类级别的求和操作
44	 *
45	 * @since 2025-04-05
46	 */
47	@Slf4j
48	public class ModuleAlgImpl extends ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements IModuleAlg {
49	
50	    /**
51	     * 部件分类算法实例映射表
52	     */
53	    protected Map<String, PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgs = new LinkedHashMap<>();
54	
55	    // 左表达式部件分类算法实例，仅针对oneMany规则
56	    private SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
57	    // 右表达式部件分类算法实例，仅针对oneMany规则
58	    private SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
59	    // 当前规则后缀，仅针对oneMany规则
60	    private String currrentRulePostName = "";
61	
62	    /**
63	     * 初始化模块算法实例
64	     * 按partCategoryCode对partCategoryInputs进行分组，然后初始化本层和子层的变量与规则
65	     * 重写基类方法，添加PartCategoryAlgImpl的初始化
66	     *
67	     * @param model              CP约束模型
68	     * @param module             模块对象
69	     * @param partCategoryInputs 来自请求的部件约束列表
70	     */
71	    public void init(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
72	            ModuleInput moduleInput) {
73	        initData(model, module, moduleInput, this);
74	
75	        afterInitData(this.module, this);
76	
77	        initInput();
78	
79	        // preCalculate
80	        preCalculate();
81	
82	        // midCalculate
83	        initRules(this, CalcStage.MID);
84	        // postCalculate
85	    }
86	
87	    // 重写父类的方法
88	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
89	        if (isOneManyRule(rule)) {
90	            executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
91	        } else {
92	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
93	        }
94	    }
95	
96	    private boolean isOneManyRule(Rule rule) {
97	        return rule.getLeftCardinality() == Cardinality.ONE && rule.getRightCardinality() == Cardinality.MANY;
98	    }
99	
100	    // 执行类似logicAB1(1-*)的用例
101	    private void executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
102	        String leftPartCategoryCode = rule.getLeftCategoryCode();
103	        String rightPartCategoryCode = rule.getRightCategoryCode();
104	        if (Strings.isEmpty(leftPartCategoryCode) || Strings.isEmpty(rightPartCategoryCode)) {
105	            log.error("leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
106	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
107	                    "leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
108	        }
109	        SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl leftPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) getPartCategoryAlg(
110	                leftPartCategoryCode);
111	        PartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImpl = getPartCategoryAlg(
112	                rightPartCategoryCode);
113	        if (leftPartCategoryAlgImpl == null || rightPartCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
114	            log.error("leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
115	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
116	                    "leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
117	        }
118	        if (rightPartCategoryAlgImpl instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) {
119	            MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl = (MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
120	            for (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem : multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl
121	                    .getPartCategoryInsts()) {
122	
123	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
124	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem;
125	                currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
126	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
127	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
128	                super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
129	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
130	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
131	            }
132	        } else {
133	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
134	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
135	            currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
136	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
137	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
138	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
139	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
140	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
141	        }
142	
143	    }
144	
145	    private ModuleInput getModuleInput() {
146	        return (ModuleInput) this.moduleInput;
147	    }
148	
149	    protected void initInput() {
150	        super.initInput(this);
151	
152	        // 本模块的初始化
153	        ModuleInput req = getModuleInput();
154	        if (req.getMainPartInst() != null) {
155	            this.addPartEquality(req.getMainPartInst().getCode(), req.getMainPartInst().getQuantity());
156	        }
157	        if (req.getPreParaInsts() != null) {
158	            for (ParaInst paraInst : req.getPreParaInsts()) {
159	                this.addParaEquality(paraInst.getCode(), paraInst.getValue());
160	            }
161	        }
162	        if (req.getPrePartInsts() != null) {
163	            for (PartInst partInst : req.getPrePartInsts()) {
164	                this.addPartEquality(partInst.getCode(), partInst.getQuantity());
165	            }
166	        }
167	
168	        // 分类的input初始化
169	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
170	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
171	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initInput(this);
172	        }
173	
174	    }
175	
176	    /**
177	     * 初始化Module后
178	     * 
179	     * @param module
180	     * @param moduleAlg
181	     */
182	    protected void afterInitData(IModule module, IModuleAlg moduleAlg) {
183	
184	    }
185	
186	    private void preCalculate() {
187	        log.info("preCalculate: module={}", getModule().getCode());
188	        // 暂时支持模块级前置计算，主要是对控制变量进行初始化
189	        if (!(module instanceof Module)) {
190	            return;
191	        }
192	        initRules(this, CalcStage.PRE);
193	    }
194	
195	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
196	            ModuleInput moduleInput,
197	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
198	        // 调用基类初始化
199	        super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, this);
200	
201	        // 按partCategoryCode对partCategoryInputs进行分组
202	        Map<String, PartCategoryInputBase> partConstraintFromReqMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
203	        for (PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput : moduleInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
204	            partConstraintFromReqMap.put(partCategoryInput.getPartCategoryCode(), partCategoryInput);
205	        }
206	
207	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
208	        if (module instanceof Module) {
209	            Module bModule = (Module) module;
210	            for (PartCategory partCategory : bModule.getPartCategorys()) {
211	                String categoryCode = partCategory.getCode();
212	                PartCategoryInputBase pc4partCategoryInput = partConstraintFromReqMap
213	                        .get(categoryCode);
214	                ModuleBaseAlgImpl pcAlg = null;
215	                if (partCategory.isSupportMultiInst() && pc4partCategoryInput instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
216	                    pcAlg = new MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
217	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) pc4partCategoryInput;
218	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) multiInstPartCategoryInput, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
219	                } else {
220	                    pcAlg = new SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
221	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) partCategory, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
222	                }
223	                partCategoryAlgs.put(categoryCode, (PartCategoryAlgImpl) pcAlg);
224	            }
225	        }
226	        log.info("ModuleAlgImpl initialized with {} partCategory algorithms", partCategoryAlgs.size());
227	    }
228	
229	    protected void initRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
230	        Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods = buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
231	        // 先本身这个模块的前置算法
232	
233	        // 先构建本模块的优先类规则
234	        buildPriorityConstraint(module);
235	
236	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
237	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
238	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
239	        }
240	
241	        // 执行本身这个模块的后置算法
242	        this.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
243	    }
244	
245	    /**
246	     * 是否有优先类规则
247	     * 
248	     * @return exr
249	     */
250	    public boolean hasPriorityRule() {
251	        return !getAllPriorityConstraintMap().isEmpty();
252	    }
253	
254	    private Map<String, PriorityConstraint> getAllPriorityConstraintMap() {
255	        // ruleCode -> PriorityConstraint
256	        Map<String, PriorityConstraint> priorityConstraints = new HashMap<>();
257	        if (getPriorityConstraint() != null) {
258	            priorityConstraints.put(getPriorityConstraint().getRule().getCode(), getPriorityConstraint());
259	        }
260	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
261	            PriorityConstraint priorityConstraint = ((ModuleBaseAlgImpl) partCategoryAlgImpl).getPriorityConstraint();
262	            if (priorityConstraint != null) {
263	                priorityConstraints.put(
264	                        priorityConstraint.getRule().getCode(), priorityConstraint);
265	            }
266	        }
267	        return priorityConstraints;
268	    }
269	
270	    /**
271	     * 获取所有的Priority合并后的表达式
272	     *
273	     * @return exr
274	     */
275	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr() {
276	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr mergedExpr = model.newPartLinearExpr("merged_priority_expr");
277	        for (PriorityConstraint pc : getAllPriorityConstraintMap().values()) {
278	            Rule rule = pc.getRule();
279	            PriorityRuleSchema schema = (PriorityRuleSchema) rule.getRawCode();
280	            PriorityStrategy strategy = schema.getPriorityStrategy();
281	            // int weight = schema.getWeight();
282	            int coff = strategy == PriorityStrategy.MAX ? -1 : 1;
283	            mergedExpr.addExpr(pc.getExpr(), coff);
284	        }
285	        return mergedExpr;
286	    }
287	
288	    /**
289	     * Update or create priority objective function for given attribute code.
290	     *
291	     * @param attrCode attribute code
292	     * @param expr     expression containing part-term metadata and numeric terms
293	     */
294	    public void updatePriorityObjectFuntion(String ruleCode, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
295	        if (ruleCode == null || ruleCode.isEmpty()) {
296	            log.warn("ruleCode is null or empty, skip updating priority objective");
297	            return;
298	        }
299	        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = getAllPriorityConstraintMap().get(ruleCode);
300	        if (pConstraint == null) {
301	            log.error("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: {}", ruleCode);
302	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: " + ruleCode);
303	        }
304	        pConstraint.setExpr(expr);
305	        log.info("Updated priority objective for ruleCode {}: expr={}", ruleCode,
306	                expr != null ? expr.toString() : "null");
307	    }

325	    public List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(String categoryCodeInstPrefix) {
326	        String instPrefix = categoryCodeInstPrefix + String.valueOf(MultiInstCategoryUtils.INST_PREFIX_CHAR);
327	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = new ArrayList<>();
328	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgs.values()) {
329	            if (partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode().startsWith(instPrefix)) {
330	                partCategoryAlgImpls.add(partCategoryAlgImpl);
331	            }
332	        }
333	        return partCategoryAlgImpls;
334	    }

382	    /**
383	     * 添加不兼容性约束（部件级别）
384	     * 
385	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
386	     * @param leftPartsExprStr  左侧部件表达式字符串，格式如 "fatherCode=cpu:CoreNum=4"
387	     * @param rightPartsExprStr 右侧部件表达式字符串
388	     */
389	    public void inCompatible(String ruleCode, String leftPartsExprStr, String rightPartsExprStr) {
390	        PartsExpr left = filterPartExpr(leftPartsExprStr, true);
391	        PartsExpr right = filterPartExpr(rightPartsExprStr, false);
392	
393	        if (left.isEmpty4FilterPars() || right.isEmpty4FilterPars()) {
394	            log.info("Skip inCompatible constraint: {} - left or right filter is empty", ruleCode);
395	            return;
396	        }
397	
398	        compatibleConstraintAlg.addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(ruleCode + currrentRulePostName, left, right);
399	    }
400	
401	    private PartsExpr filterPartExpr(String partExprStr, boolean isLeft) {
402	        if (partExprStr == null || partExprStr.isEmpty()) {
403	            // 打日志，抛异常
404	            log.error("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
405	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
406	        }
407	        PartsExpr partsExpr = new PartsExpr();
408	        // 解析partCategoryCode和filterConditionStr
409	        String partCategoryCode = "";
410	        String filterConditionStr = "";
411	
412	        int colonIndex = partExprStr.indexOf(':');
413	        if (colonIndex > 0) {
414	            partCategoryCode = partExprStr.substring(0, colonIndex);
415	            filterConditionStr = partExprStr.substring(colonIndex + 1);
416	        } else {
417	            // 打日志，抛异常
418	            log.error("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
419	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
420	        }
421	
422	        partsExpr.setFilterConditionStr(filterConditionStr);
423	
424	        PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl = isLeft ? currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl
425	                : currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
426	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
427	            // 兼容以前的
428	            partCategoryAlgImpl = this.getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
429	        } else {
430	            if (!partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode().equals(partCategoryCode)) {
431	                // 打日志，抛异常
432	                log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
433	                throw new AlgLoaderException("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
434	            }
435	        }
436	
437	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
438	            // 打日志，抛异常
439	            log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
440	            return partsExpr;
441	        }
442	        // 转换为PartVar
443	        partsExpr.setPartVars(partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(""));
444	        Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.filterAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
445	        partsExpr.setFilterPartVars(partVars.getFirst());
446	        partsExpr.setNoFilterPartVars(partVars.getSecond());
447	        return partsExpr;
448	    }
449

451	    // * 解析部件表达式字符串
452	    // * 格式：fatherCode=xxx:filterCondition
453	    // *
454	    // * @param partExprStr 部件表达式字符串
455	    // * @return PartsExpr
456	    // */

512	    /**
513	     * 将Part列表转换为PartVar列表
514	     * 
515	     * @param parts Part列表
516	     * @return PartVar列表
517	     */
518	    public List<PartVar> toFilterPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String filtedConditionStr) {
519	        List<Part> atomicParts = partCategoryAlgImpl.getAtomicParts();
520	        if (filtedConditionStr != null && !filtedConditionStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
521	            atomicParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, filtedConditionStr);
522	            log.info("Priority-Filtered parts: {} in sum4Parts", PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts));
523	        }
524	        return toPartVar(partCategoryAlgImpl, atomicParts);
525	    }

527	    /**
528	     * 将Part列表转换为PartVar列表
529	     * 
530	     * @param parts Part列表
531	     * @return PartVar列表
532	     */
533	    public List<PartVar> toPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, List<Part> parts) {
534	        return parts.stream()
535	                .map(t -> toPartVar(
536	                        partCategoryAlgImpl, t))
537	                .filter(pv -> pv != null)
538	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
539	    }
540	
541	    /**
542	     * 将Part对象转换为PartVar
543	     * 
544	     * @param part Part对象
545	     * @return PartVar，如果不存在则返回null
546	     */
547	    public PartVar toPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, Part part) {
548	        PartVar partVar = partCategoryAlgImpl.getPartVar(part.getCode());
549	        if (partVar == null) {
550	            // 打日志，抛异常
551	            log.error("PartVar not found for code: {}", part.getCode());
552	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PartVar not found for code: " + part.getCode());
553	        }
554	        return partVar;
555	    }
556	
557	    /**
558	     * 通用的部件求和方法，根据指定的变量获取函数计算总和
559	     * 
560	     * @param cofAttrCode        属性代码，如果为null或空则使用默认值1
561	     * @param varGetter          从PartVar获取LinearArgument的函数（如getIsSelected或getQty）
562	     * @param varName            变量名称（如"isSelected"或"qty"），用于构建字符串表达式
563	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
564	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
565	     */
566	    // @Override
567	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Parts(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String cofAttrCode,
568	            Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String varName, String filtedConditionStr) {
569	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr = buildSumExpr(
570	                partCategoryAlgImpl,
571	                cofAttrCode, varName, varGetter,
572	                filtedConditionStr);
573	        return expr;
574	    }
575	
576	    /**
577	     * 对指定部件分类的部件求和（选中状态，支持多分类逗号分隔）
578	     * 
579	     * @param partCategoryCodesStr 部件分类代码，支持逗号分隔，如 "driveI0,driveI1"
580	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码
581	     * @param filtedConditionStr   过滤条件字符串
582	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
583	     */
584	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
585	            String filtedConditionStr) {
586	        if (partCategoryCodesStr == null || partCategoryCodesStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
587	            return sum4Selected(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
588	        }
589	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = toPartCategoryAlgImpls(partCategoryCodesStr);
590	
591	        return buildSumExpr(
592	                partCategoryAlgImpls, cofAttrCode, PartVar.ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME, PartVar::getIsSelected,
593	                filtedConditionStr);
594	    }
595	
596	    /**
597	     * 对指定部件分类的部件求和（数量，支持多分类逗号分隔）
598	     * 
599	     * @param partCategoryCodesStr 部件分类代码，支持逗号分隔，如 "driveI0,driveI1"
600	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码
601	     * @param filtedConditionStr   过滤条件字符串
602	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
603	     */
604	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Quantity(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
605	            String filtedConditionStr) {
606	        if (Strings.isEmpty(partCategoryCodesStr)) {
607	            return sum4Quantity(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
608	        }
609	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = toPartCategoryAlgImpls(partCategoryCodesStr);
610	        return buildSumExpr(partCategoryAlgImpls, cofAttrCode, PartVar.QTY_SHORT_NAME, PartVar::getQty,
611	                filtedConditionStr);
612	    }
613	
614	    private List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> toPartCategoryAlgImpls(String partCategoryCodesStr) {
615	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = new ArrayList<>();
616	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.isEmpty()) {
617	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
618	        }
619	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.contains("*")) {
620	            String partCategoryCodePrefix = partCategoryCodesStr.replace("*", "");
621	            partCategoryAlgImpls.addAll(getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix));
622	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
623	        }
624	        String[] categoryCodes = partCategoryCodesStr.split(",");
625	        for (String categoryCode : categoryCodes) {
626	            partCategoryAlgImpls.add(getPartCategoryAlg(categoryCode));
627	        }
628	        return partCategoryAlgImpls;
629	    }
630

637	     */
638	
639	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String cofAttrCode,
640	            String filtedConditionStr) {

642	                PartVar.ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME, filtedConditionStr);
643	    }

676	
677	    public void addControlParaEqual(String sumParaCode, String instSumParaCode) {
678	        // 动态表达式 addParaEqual("driveSumQuantity", "drive:SumQuantity");
679	        ParaVar sumParaVar = this.getParaVar(sumParaCode);
680	        if (sumParaVar == null) {
681	            // 打日志，抛异常
682	            log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumParaCode);
683	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " + sumParaCode);
684	        }
685	        // instSumParaCode,如："drive:SumQuantity", 解析出drive，SumQuantity
686	        String[] parts = instSumParaCode.split(":");
687	        if (parts.length != 2) {
688	            // 打日志，抛异常
689	            log.error("instSumParaCode is invalid: {}", instSumParaCode);
690	            throw new AlgLoaderException("instSumParaCode is invalid: " + instSumParaCode);
691	        }
692	
693	        String partCategoryCodePrefix = parts[0].trim();
694	        String sumQuantityCode = parts[1].trim();
695	        // expr=sumParaVar.value + sumParaVar.value + ...
696	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = this.getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix);
697	        if (partCategoryAlgImpls.isEmpty()) {
698	            // 打日志，抛异常
699	            log.warn("PartCategoryAlgImpl not found for code: {}", partCategoryCodePrefix);
700	            sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
701	        } else {
702	            Integer sumInputValue = 0;
703	            boolean hasInput = false;
704	            for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
705	                ParaVar instParaVar = partCategoryAlgImpl.getParaVar(sumQuantityCode);
706	                if (instParaVar == null || instParaVar.getInputValue() == null) {
707	                    // 打日志，抛异常
708	                    log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumQuantityCode);
709	                    // 暂时不抛异常 throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " +
710	                    // sumQuantityCode);
711	                    // issue:是不是总有一个控制参数是有输入的，方便执行（对结果进行校验）
712	                    continue;
713	                }
714	                // paraSumExpr.addTerm(instParaVar.getInputValue(), 1);
715	                sumInputValue += instParaVar.getInputValue();
716	                hasInput = true;
717	            }
718	            if (hasInput) {
719	                // 构建等式
720	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(true);
721	                sumParaVar.setInputValue(sumInputValue);
722	
723	            } else {
724	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
725	            }
726	
727	        }
728	
729	    }
730	}
731
```

```text
58	@Slf4j
59	public abstract class ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements IModuleAlg {
60

142	     */
143	    protected void setPartCategoryInput(PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput) {
144	        if (null == partCategoryInput) {
145	            return;
146	        }
147	        setPartCategoryInputVariales(partCategoryInput);
148	        if (Strings.isNotEmpty(partCategoryInput.getComparator())) {
149	            model.addRuleSeperator("input_constraint_" + partCategoryInput.getPartCategoryCode() + this.getInstId());
150	            sumFunConstraint(this, partCategoryInput);
151	        }
152	    }
153	
154	    protected void setPartCategoryInputVariales(PartCategoryInputBase ipt) {
155	        if (!Strings.isNotEmpty(ipt.getSumAttrCode())) {
156	            return;
157	        }
158	        // 多实例后，不支持这种方式，ontoCode = pt.getFilteredCategory().getCode(); String paraCode =
159	        // ontoCode + "Sum" + pt.getSumAttrCode();
160	        String paraCode = ipt.getAttrType().name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + ipt.getSumAttrCode();
161	
162	        ParaVar pVar = this.getParaVar(paraCode);
163	        if (pVar == null) {
164	            pVar = newAttrParaVar(paraCode);
165	            log.info("Dynamic created para: {}", paraCode);
166	        } else {
167	            log.info("Para already exists for paraCode: {}, skipping", paraCode);
168	        }
169	
170	        pVar.setInputValue(ipt.getLeftValue());
171	        pVar.setIsHasInputed(Boolean.TRUE);
172	        log.info("Set input variable {} = {}", paraCode, ipt.getLeftValue());
173	
174	    }
175	
176	    /**
177	     * 设置默认可见性约束
178	     * 对于没有显式控制可见性的变量，设置 isHiddenVar == 0（即默认可见）
179	     * 遍历所有变量，为没有显式可见性控制的变量设置默认可见状态
180	     * 
181	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
182	     */
183	    protected void setDefaultVisibilityConstraints() {
184	        boolean isFirst = true;
185	        for (ParaVar paraVar : this.getParaVars()) {
186	            if (codesOfHiddenConstraint.contains(paraVar.getCode())) {
187	                continue;
188	            }
189	            if (isFirst) {
190	                this.model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule");
191	                isFirst = false;
192	            }
193	            if (paraVar.getBase().getAssignType() == AssignType.CALC) {
194	                // 暂时没有添加到松弛变量里
195	                model.addEquality(paraVar.getIsHidden(), 0);
196	            }
197	        }
198	        for (PartVar partVar : this.getPartVars()) {
199	            if (codesOfHiddenConstraint.contains(partVar.getCode())) {
200	                continue;
201	            }
202	            if (isFirst) {
203	                this.model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule");
204	                isFirst = false;
205	            }
206	            model.addEquality(partVar.getIsHidden(), 0);
207	        }
208	    }
209	
210	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExprInternal(PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr,
211	            PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String attrCode,
212	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
213	        boolean isWithoutAttr = attrCode == null || attrCode.isEmpty();
214	        List<PartVar> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(filtedConditionStr);
215	        for (PartVar partVar : partVars) {
216	            int attrValue;
217	            if (isWithoutAttr) {
218	                attrValue = 1;
219	            } else if (PartConstantAttr.Quantity.getCode().equals(attrCode)) {
220	                attrValue = 1;
221	            } else {
222	                attrValue = partVar.getAttr4Int(attrCode);
223	            }
224	            algExpr.addTerm(partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode(), partVar, (IntVar) varGetter.apply(partVar),
225	                    attrValue, varName);
226	        }
227	
228	        return algExpr;
229	    }
230	
231	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExpr(List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls, String attrCode,
232	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
233	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr = new PartAlgCPLinearExpr(
234	                partCategoryAlgImpls.get(0).getCategoryCode() + "_" + partCategoryAlgImpls.get(0).getInstId()
235	                        + "_sumPars_"
236	                        + (attrCode == null ? "" : attrCode) + "_" + varName);
237	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
238	            buildSumExprInternal(algExpr, partCategoryAlgImpl, attrCode, varName, varGetter, filtedConditionStr);
239	        }
240	        return algExpr;
241	    }
242	
243	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExpr(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String attrCode,
244	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
245	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr = new PartAlgCPLinearExpr(
246	                partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_" + partCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId() + "_sumPars_"
247	                        + (attrCode == null ? "" : attrCode) + "_" + varName);
248	        return buildSumExprInternal(algExpr, partCategoryAlgImpl, attrCode, varName, varGetter, filtedConditionStr);
249	    }

251	    protected void sumFunConstraint(ModuleBaseAlgImpl moduleBaseAlgImpl,
252	            PartCategoryInputBase partConstraint) {
253	        // 子类继承实现
254	    }
255	
256	    /**
257	     * 添加松弛目标函数
258	     * 目标函数：最小化需要松弛的约束数量（带权重）
259	     */
260	    public void addRelaxObjectFunction() {
261	        if (!model.isIsAttachRelax()) {
262	            return;
263	        }
264	
265	        // 目标函数：最小化需要松弛的约束数量（带权重）
266	        List<RelaxVar> relaxVars = new ArrayList<>(model.getRelaxVarMap().values());
267	        if (!relaxVars.isEmpty()) {
268	            // 构建加权目标函数：min(relaxVar[0].value * relaxVar[0].weight + relaxVar[1].value *
269	            // relaxVar[1].weight + ...)
270	            AlgCPLinearExpr[] weightedTerms = new AlgCPLinearExpr[relaxVars.size()];
271	            for (int i = 0; i < relaxVars.size(); i++) {
272	                RelaxVar relaxVar = relaxVars.get(i);
273	                weightedTerms[i] = AlgCPLinearExpr.term(relaxVar.getValue(), relaxVar.getWeight());
274	            }
275	            AlgCPLinearExpr objectiveExpr = AlgCPLinearExpr.sum(weightedTerms);
276	            model.minimize(objectiveExpr);
277	            log.info("relax: -----relaxation objective function with {} relaxation variables", relaxVars.size());
278	        }
279	    }
280	
281	    /**
282	     * 执行单个规则方法
283	     *
284	     * @param ruleCode 规则代码
285	     * @param method   规则方法
286	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
287	     */
288	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, Method method) {
289	        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, this);
290	        executeRuleMethod(rule, this, method);
291	        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, null);
292	    }
293	
294	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
295	        if (method == null) {
296	            log.error("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
297	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
298	        }
299	        try {
300	            // 设置当前松弛变量名称
301	            this.model.setRelax4CustomRule(rule.getCode());
302	
303	            // 执行规则方法
304	            method.setAccessible(true);
305	            method.invoke(moduleAlgFile);
306	            log.info("Executed rule method: {}", method.getName());
307	        } catch (IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {
308	            log.error("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
309	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
310	        }
311	    }
312	
313	    /**
314	     * 模型初始化后的回调方法
315	     * 子类可以重写此方法来实现自定义的初始化逻辑
316	     * 
317	     * @param model CP模型实例
318	     */
319	    protected void initModelAfter(AlgCPModel model) {
320	
321	    }
322	
323	    /**
324	     * 初始化所有变量（paras和parts）
325	     * 遍历module的paras，创建ParaVar并放到paraMap
326	     * 遍历module的parts，创建PartVar并放到partMap
327	     */
328	    protected void initAll(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
329	        if (module == null) {
330	            log.warn("Module is null, skip initAll");
331	            return;
332	        }
333	
334	        // 初始化所有paras
335	        for (Para para : module.getParas()) {
336	            ParaVar paraVar = initParaVar(para);
337	            paraMap.put(para.getCode(), paraVar);
338	        }
339	        log.info("Initialized {} para variables", paraMap.size());
340	
341	        // 初始化所有parts（原子部件）
342	        for (Part part : module.getAtomicParts()) {
343	            PartVar partVar = initPartVar(part);
344	            partMap.put(part.getCode(), partVar);
345	        }
346	        log.info("Initialized {} part variables", partMap.size());
347	    }
348	
349	    /**
350	     * 初始化AttrParas，创建对应的Para和ParaVar
351	     * 
352	     * @param attrParas 属性参数列表
353	     */
354	    protected void newAttrParaVar(List<AttrPara> attrParas) {
355	        if (attrParas == null || attrParas.isEmpty()) {
356	            return;
357	        }
358	        for (AttrPara attrPara : attrParas) {
359	            newAttrParaVar(attrPara);
360	        }
361	    }
362	
363	    /**
364	     * 初始化单个AttrPara，创建对应的Para和ParaVar
365	     * 
366	     * @param attrPara 属性参数
367	     */
368	    protected void newAttrParaVar(AttrPara attrPara) {
369	        if (attrPara == null || attrPara.getAttrCode() == null) {
370	            return;
371	        }
372	        String paraCode = attrPara.getType().name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + attrPara.getAttrCode();
373	        newAttrParaVar(paraCode);
374	    }
375	
376	    protected ParaVar newAttrParaVar(String paraCode) {
377	        if (paraMap.containsKey(paraCode)) {
378	            log.error("Para already exists for attrCode: {}, skipping", paraCode);
379	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Para already exists for attrCode: " + paraCode);
380	        }
381	        Para para = new Para();
382	        para.setCode(paraCode);
383	        para.setAssignType(AssignType.INPUT);
384	        // 从对应的属性里面获取数据issue（min，max等）
385	        para.setParaType(ParaType.INTEGER);
386	        // ModuleBase tempModule = (ModuleBase) module;
387	        // tempModule.addPara(para);
388	        ParaVar pVar = initParaVar(para);
389	        paraMap.put(paraCode, pVar);
390	        return pVar;
391	    }
392	
393	    /**
394	     * 初始化参数变量
395	     * 根据参数类型创建对应的变量（INTEGER/ENUM）
396	     * 
397	     * @param para 参数对象
398	     * @return 创建的参数变量
399	     */
400	    protected ParaVar initParaVar(Para para) {
401	        String code = para.getCode();
402	        ParaVar paraVar = new ParaVar();
403	        paraVar.setBase(para);
404	
405	        if (para.getAssignType() == AssignType.INPUT) {
406	            return paraVar;
407	        }
408	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
409	        switch (para.getParaType()) {
410	            case INTEGER:
411	                paraVar.setValue(newIntVar(Integer.parseInt(para.getMinValue()), Integer.parseInt(para.getMaxValue()),
412	                        f(ParaVar.VALUE_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
413	                break;
414	            case ENUM:
415	                List<DynamicAttributerOption> options = para.getOptions();
416	                if (options == null || options.isEmpty()) {
417	                    log.error("Para options not found for code: {}", code);
418	                    throw new AlgLoaderException("Para options not found for code: " + code);
419	                }
420	                paraVar.setValue(newIntVarFromDomain(para.getOptionIds(), f(ParaVar.VALUE_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
421	
422	                for (DynamicAttributerOption option : options) {
423	                    ParaOptionVar optionVar = createParaOptionVar(para.getCode(), option.getCode());
424	                    paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().put(option.getCodeId(), optionVar);
425	                }
426	                paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().forEach((optionId, optionVar) -> {
427	                    model.addEquality(paraVar.getValue(), optionId).onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar());
428	                    model.addDifferent(paraVar.getValue(), optionId)
429	                            .onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar().not());
430	                });
431	                break;
432	            default:
433	                log.error("Para type not supported: {}", para.getParaType());
434	                throw new AlgLoaderException("Para type not supported: " + para.getParaType());
435	        }
436	        paraVar.setIsHidden(newBoolVar(f(ParaVar.HIDDEN_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
437	        paraVar.setInstId(getInstId());
438	        return paraVar;
439	    }
440	
441	    private String toInstPrefix() {
442	        final String prefix = (getInstId() == ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID ? "" : "I" + getInstId() + "_");
443	        return prefix;
444	    }
445	
446	    /**
447	     * 初始化部件变量
448	     * 创建部件的数量、选中状态和隐藏状态变量
449	     * 
450	     * @param part 部件对象
451	     * @return 创建的部件变量
452	     */
453	    protected PartVar initPartVar(Part part) {
454	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
455	        PartVar partVar = new PartVar();
456	        partVar.setBase(part);
457	        partVar.setQty(newIntVar(0, part.getMaxQuantity(), f(PartVar.QTY_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
458	        partVar.setIsHidden(newBoolVar(f(PartVar.HIDDEN_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
459	        partVar.setIsSelected(newBoolVar(f(PartVar.ISSELECTED_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
460	        partVar.setInstId(getInstId());
461	        // 添加Qty和IsSelected的关系
462	        model.addGreaterOrEqual(partVar.getQty(), 1).onlyEnforceIf(partVar.getIsSelected());
463	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), 0).onlyEnforceIf(partVar.getIsSelected().not());
464	
465	        return partVar;
466	    }

473	    public List<PartVar> getPartVars() {

475	    }

488	     */
489	    protected void onInitCustomVariables() {
490	        // 默认空实现，子类可以重写
491	    }
492	
493	    /**
494	     * 过滤出指定fatherCode的规则
495	     *
496	     * @param rules      所有规则列表
497	     * @param fatherCode 父级代码，如果为null则获取模块级别的规则
498	     * @return 过滤后的规则列表
499	     */
500	    protected List<Rule> filterRulesByFatherCode(List<Rule> rules, String fatherCode) {
501	        if (rules == null) {
502	            return new java.util.ArrayList<>();
503	        }
504	        return rules.stream()
505	                .filter(rule -> {
506	                    if (fatherCode == null) {
507	                        return rule.getFatherCode() == null || rule.getFatherCode().isEmpty();
508	                    }
509	                    return fatherCode.equals(rule.getFatherCode());
510	                })
511	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
512	    }
513	
514	    /**
515	     * 根据module.getAllRules()构建所有规则方法的映射
516	     *
517	     * @param module 模块对象
518	     * @return 规则代码到方法对象的映射
519	     */
520	    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module) {
521	        return buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
522	    }
523	
524	    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
525	        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null) {
526	            return new HashMap<>();
527	        }
528	
529	        // 获取当前类的所有方法
530	        Method[] methods = moduleAlgFile.getClass().getDeclaredMethods();
531	        Map<String, Method> allMethods = new HashMap<>();
532	
533	        // 构建方法名到Method对象的映射
534	        for (Method method : methods) {
535	            allMethods.put(method.getName(), method);
536	        }
537	
538	        // 根据module.getAllRules()来构建ruleMethods
539	        Map<String, Method> ruleMethods = new HashMap<>();
540	        for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
541	            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
542	            Method method = allMethods.get(ruleCode);
543	            if (method != null) {
544	                ruleMethods.put(ruleCode, method);
545	                log.info("Built rule method mapping: {} -> {}", ruleCode, method.getName());
546	                // // 检查是否是PriorityRule，如果是则构建优先级约束
547	                // if (RuleTypeConstants.isPriorityRule(rule.getRuleSchemaTypeFullName())) {
548	                // buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
549	                // }
550	            } else {
551	                log.warn("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
552	            }
553	        }
554	
555	        log.info("Built {} rule methods from module rules", ruleMethods.size());
556	        return ruleMethods;
557	    }
558	
559	    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(IModule module) {
560	        module.getPriorityRules().forEach(rule -> buildPriorityConstraint(rule));
561	        for (Rule rule : module.getPriorityRules()) {
562	            buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
563	        }
564	    }
565	
566	    /**
567	     * 构建优先级约束
568	     * 
569	     * @param rule 规则对象
570	     */
571	    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(Rule rule) {
572	        if (rule.getRawCode() == null || !(rule.getRawCode() instanceof PriorityRuleSchema)) {
573	            log.warn("Rule rawCode is not PriorityRuleSchema for rule: {}", rule.getCode());
574	            return;
575	        }
576	        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = new PriorityConstraint();
577	        pConstraint.setRule(rule);
578	        setPriorityConstraint(pConstraint);
579	    }
580	
581	    /**
582	     * 将变量写回字段，保证规则使用变量是同一个
583	     */
584	    protected void writeBackToFields(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
585	        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = getAllFieldVariables(moduleAlgFile);
586	        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
587	        // 处理PartVar
588	        for (Map.Entry<String, PartVar> entry : partMap.entrySet()) {
589	            String code = entry.getKey();
590	            PartVar partVar = entry.getValue();
591	            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
592	            if (field != null) {
593	                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newPartVar(partVar);
594	                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
595	            }
596	        }
597	
598	        // 处理ParaVar
599	        for (Map.Entry<String, ParaVar> entry : paraMap.entrySet()) {
600	            String code = entry.getKey();
601	            ParaVar paraVar = entry.getValue();
602	            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
603	            if (field != null) {
604	                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newParaVar(paraVar);
605	                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
606	            }
607	        }
608	    }
609	
610	    /**
611	     * 执行本层的规则
612	     *
613	     * @param allRuleMethods 所有规则方法映射
614	     */
615	    protected void executeModuleRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
616	            CalcStage calcStage) {
617	        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
618	            return;
619	        }
620	
621	        List<Rule> moduleRules = module.getRules(calcStage);
622	        executeModuleRules(moduleRules, moduleAlgFile, allRuleMethods, calcStage);
623	    }
624	
625	    /**
626	     * 执行本层的规则
627	     *
628	     * @param allRuleMethods 所有规则方法映射
629	     */
630	    protected void executeModuleRules(List<Rule> rules, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
631	            CalcStage calcStage) {
632	        if (rules == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
633	            return;
634	        }
635	        for (Rule rule : rules) {
636	            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
637	            Method method = allRuleMethods.get(ruleCode);
638	            if (method == null) {
639	                log.error("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
640	                throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for rule code: " + ruleCode + " in class "
641	                        + this.getClass().getName());
642	            }
643	            model.addRuleSeperator(ruleCode);
644	            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, this);
645	            executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
646	            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, null);
647	        }
648	    }
649	
650	    private void setCurrentModule4Rule(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, ModuleBaseAlgImpl tmpModuleAlg) {
651	        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
652	        algFileImpl.currentModule = (tmpModuleAlg == null ? null : tmpModuleAlg.getModule());
653	        algFileImpl.currentModuleAlg = tmpModuleAlg;
654	
655	    }
656	
657	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput,
658	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
659	        // Module级别
660	        this.model = model;
661	        this.module = module;
662	        this.moduleInput = moduleInput;
663	        // 初始化兼容性约束算法实例
664	        this.compatibleConstraintAlg = new CompatibleConstraintAlg(model);
665	        initModelAfter(model);
666	
667	        // 初始化本层变量（paras和parts）
668	        initAll(moduleAlgFile);
669	    }
670	
671	    protected void initInput(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
672	        // 将变量写回字段
673	        writeBackToFields(moduleAlgFile);
674	
675	        log.info("ModuleBaseAlgImpl initInput {}", module.getClass().getSimpleName());
676	    }
677	
678	    public void initRules(Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
679	        // 执行本层的规则
680	        executeModuleRules(moduleAlgFile, allRuleMethods, calcStage);
681	
682	        if (calcStage == CalcStage.MID) {
683	            // 设置默认可见性约束
684	            setDefaultVisibilityConstraints();
685	        }
686	
687	        log.info("ModuleBaseAlgImpl initRules {}", module.getClass().getSimpleName());
688	    }

706	    /**
707	     * 设置单个变量字段
708	     * 
709	     * @param v     变量值
710	     * @param field 字段对象
711	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
712	     */
713	    protected void setVariableField(Var<?> v, Field field) throws AlgLoaderException {
714	        setVariableField(this, v, field);
715	    }
716	
717	    protected void setVariableField(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Var<?> v, Field field) throws AlgLoaderException {
718	        if (field == null) {
719	            log.error("Field not found for code: null {}", v.getCode());
720	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Field not found for code: null " + v.getCode());
721	        }
722	        try {
723	            field.setAccessible(true);
724	            field.set(moduleAlgFile, v);
725	        } catch (IllegalArgumentException | IllegalAccessException e) {
726	            log.error("Failed to write back variable to field: " + v.getCode(), e);
727	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to write back variable to field: " + v.getCode(), e);
728	        }
729	    }
730	
731	    /**
732	     * 获取所有字段变量
733	     * 
734	     * @return 字段映射表
735	     */
736	    protected Map<String, Field> getAllFieldVariables() { // TODO delete
737	        Field[] fields = this.getClass().getDeclaredFields();
738	        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = new HashMap<>();
739	        for (Field field : fields) {
740	            field.setAccessible(true);
741	            fieldMap.put(extractCodeFromFieldName(field.getName()), field);
742	        }
743	        return fieldMap;
744	    }
745	
746	    /**
747	     * 算法文件类，获取所有字段变量
748	     * 
749	     * @return 字段映射表
750	     */
751	    protected Map<String, Field> getAllFieldVariables(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
752	        Field[] fields = moduleAlgFile.getClass().getDeclaredFields();
753	        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = new HashMap<>();
754	        for (Field field : fields) {
755	            field.setAccessible(true);
756	            fieldMap.put(extractCodeFromFieldName(field.getName()), field);
757	        }
758	        return fieldMap;
759	    }
760	
761	    /**
762	     * 从字段名提取代码
763	     * 例如: colorVar -> Color, tShirt11Var -> TShirt11
764	     * 
765	     * @param fieldName 字段名
766	     * @return 提取的代码，如果字段名不以"Var"结尾则返回原字段名
767	     */
768	    private String extractCodeFromFieldName(String fieldName) {
769	        // 移除末尾的"Var"
770	        if (fieldName.endsWith("Var")) {
771	            return fieldName.substring(0, fieldName.length() - 3);
772	        }
773	        return fieldName;
774	    }

894	    /**
895	     * Return list of atomic parts used by sum4Selected, optionally filtered by
896	     * condition.
897	     *
898	     * @param filtedConditionStr filter expression, may be null
899	     * @return filtered list of atomic parts
900	     */
901	    public List<PartVar> getInternalPartVars(String filtedConditionStr) {
902	        List<Part> atomicParts = currentModule.getAtomicParts();
903	        if (filtedConditionStr != null && !filtedConditionStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
904	            atomicParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, filtedConditionStr);
905	            log.info("Priority-Filtered parts: {} in getPartVars", PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts));
906	        }
907	        List<PartVar> partVars = new ArrayList<>();
908	        for (Part part : atomicParts) {
909	            partVars.add(currentModuleAlg.getPartVar(part.getCode()));
910	        }
911	        return partVars;
912	    }
913	
914	    /**
915	     * 创建参数选项变量
916	     * 
917	     * @param paraCode   参数代码
918	     * @param optionCode 选项代码
919	     * @return 创建的参数选项变量
920	     */
921	    protected ParaOptionVar createParaOptionVar(String paraCode, String optionCode) {
922	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
923	        Optional<Para> paraOpt = module != null ? module.getPara(paraCode) : Optional.empty();
924	        if (!paraOpt.isPresent()) {
925	            log.error("Para not found for code: {}", paraCode);
926	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Para not found for code: " + paraCode);
927	        }
928	        Para para = paraOpt.get();
929	        Optional<DynamicAttributerOption> optionOpt = para.getOption(optionCode);
930	        if (!optionOpt.isPresent()) {
931	            log.error("ParaOption not found for code: {}", optionCode);
932	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaOption not found for code: " + optionCode);
933	        }
934	        DynamicAttributerOption option = optionOpt.get();
935	        ParaOptionVar optionVar = new ParaOptionVar(option);
936	        optionVar.setIsSelectedVar(newBoolVar(f(ParaVar.OPTIONS_PATTERN, ipf, paraCode, option.getCode())));
937	        return optionVar;
938	    }
939	
940	    /**
941	     * 兼容性规则：Requires关系约束
942	     * 规则内容：如果左侧参数选择指定选项，则右侧参数必须选择指定选项
943	     * 例如：(a1,a3) Requires (b1,b2,b3) 表示如果A选择a1或a3，则B必须选择b1、b2或b3
944	     * 
945	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
946	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
947	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
948	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
949	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
950	     */
951	    public void addCompatibleConstraintRequires(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
952	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
953	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
954	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
955	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
956	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
957	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
958	
959	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
960	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
961	
962	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
963	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
964	
965	        // 实现Requires关系：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为true
966	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightCond);
967	    }
968	
969	    /**
970	     * 添加部件数量相等约束
971	     * 根据partCode找到对应的partVar，并添加数量相等约束
972	     * 
973	     * @param partCode     部件代码
974	     * @param partQuantity 期望的部件数量
975	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
976	     */
977	    public void addPartEquality(String partCode, int partQuantity) {
978	        // 设置当前松弛变量名称
979	        this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addPartEquality_" + partCode + "_" + partQuantity);
980	        // 1. 根据partCode找到对应的partVar
981	        PartVar partVar = partMap.get(partCode);
982	        if (partVar == null) {
983	            log.error("PartVar not found for code: {}", partCode);
984	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PartVar not found for code: " + partCode);
985	        }
986	        // 2. 使用model.addEquality添加数量约束
987	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), partQuantity);
988	    }
989	
990	    /**
991	     * 添加参数相等约束
992	     * 
993	     * @param paraCode  参数代码
994	     * @param paraValue 参数值
995	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
996	     */
997	    public void addParaEquality(String paraCode, String paraValue) {
998	        // 设置当前松弛变量名称
999	        this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addParaEquality_" + paraCode + "_" + paraValue);
1000	        ParaVar paraVar = paraMap.get(paraCode);
1001	        if (paraVar == null) {
1002	            log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", paraCode);
1003	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " + paraCode);
1004	        }
1005	        model.addEquality(paraVar.getValue(), Integer.parseInt(paraValue));
1006	    }
1007	
1008	    /**
1009	     * 兼容性规则：CoDependent关系约束
1010	     * 规则内容：双向依赖关系，左侧参数和右侧参数必须在对应的组内或组外
1011	     * 例如：(a1,a3) CoDependent (b1,b2,b3) 表示：
1012	     * - 如果A选择a1或a3，则B必须选择b1、b2或b3
1013	     * - 如果A选择a2、a4或a5，则B必须选择b4或b5
1014	     * - 如果B选择b1、b2或b3，则A必须选择a1或a3
1015	     * - 如果B选择b4或b5，则A必须选择a2、a4或a5
1016	     * 
1017	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
1018	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
1019	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1020	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
1021	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1022	     */
1023	    public void addCompatibleConstraintCoDependent(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
1024	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1025	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
1026	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1027	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
1028	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1029	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
1030	
1031	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
1032	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
1033	
1034	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
1035	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
1036	
1037	        // 定义左侧非条件：左侧集合外至少一个被选中
1038	        BoolVar leftNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1039	                "leftNotCond");
1040	
1041	        // 定义右侧非条件：右侧集合外至少一个被选中
1042	        BoolVar rightNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes,
1043	                "rightNotCond");
1044	
1045	        // 实现CoDependent双向关系：
1046	        // 正向1.1：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为true
1047	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightCond);
1048	
1049	        // 正向1.2：如果左侧非条件为true，则右侧非条件必须为true
1050	        model.addImplication(leftNotCond, rightNotCond);
1051	
1052	        // 反向2.1：如果右侧条件为true，则左侧条件必须为true
1053	        model.addImplication(rightCond, leftCond);
1054	
1055	        // 反向2.2：如果右侧非条件为true，则左侧非条件必须为true
1056	        model.addImplication(rightNotCond, leftNotCond);
1057	    }
1058	
1059	    /**
1060	     * 兼容性规则：Incompatible关系约束
1061	     * 规则内容：双向不兼容关系，左侧参数和右侧参数不能在对应的组内同时存在
1062	     * 例如：(a1,a3) Incompatible (b1,b2,b3) 表示：
1063	     * - 如果A选择a1或a3，则B不能选择b1、b2或b3（必须选择b4或b5）
1064	     * - 如果A选择a2、a4或a5，则B可以选择任意值
1065	     * - 如果B选择b1、b2或b3，则A不能选择a1或a3（必须选择a2、a4或a5）
1066	     * - 如果B选择b4或b5，则A可以选择任意值
1067	     * 
1068	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
1069	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
1070	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1071	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
1072	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1073	     */
1074	    public void addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
1075	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1076	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
1077	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1078	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
1079	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1080	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
1081	
1082	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
1083	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
1084	
1085	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
1086	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
1087	
1088	        // 定义左侧非条件：左侧集合外至少一个被选中
1089	        BoolVar leftNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1090	                "leftNotCond");
1091	
1092	        // 定义右侧非条件：右侧集合外至少一个被选中
1093	        BoolVar rightNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes,
1094	                "rightNotCond");
1095	
1096	        // 实现Incompatible双向关系：
1097	        // 正向1.1：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为false（右侧非条件必须为true）
1098	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightNotCond);
1099	
1100	        // 正向1.2：如果左侧非条件为true，则右侧可以是任意值（无约束）
1101	        // 这个约束不需要显式添加，因为默认允许
1102	
1103	        // 反向2.1：如果右侧条件为true，则左侧条件必须为false（左侧非条件必须为true）
1104	        model.addImplication(rightCond, leftNotCond);
1105	
1106	        // 反向2.2：如果右侧非条件为true，则左侧可以是任意值（无约束）
1107	        // 这个约束不需要显式添加，因为默认允许
1108	    }
1109	
1110	    /**
1111	     * 字符串格式化工具方法
1112	     * 
1113	     * @param fstr   格式化字符串
1114	     * @param values 参数值
1115	     * @return 格式化后的字符串
1116	     */
1117	    private String f(String fstr, String... values) {
1118	        return String.format(Locale.ROOT, fstr, (Object[]) values);
1119	    }
1120	
1121	    /**
1122	     * 创建字符串列表的工具方法
1123	     * 封装Arrays.asList，提供更简洁的API
1124	     * 
1125	     * @param codes 字符串数组
1126	     * @return List<String>
1127	     */
1128	    protected List<String> listOf(String... codes) {
1129	        return Arrays.asList(codes);
1130	    }
1131	
1132	    /**
1133	     * 为参数变量添加"确保只有一个选项被选中"的约束
1134	     * 
1135	     * @param paraVar 参数变量
1136	     */
1137	    private void addExactlyOneConstraint(ParaVar paraVar) {
1138	        model.addExactlyOne(paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1139	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1140	                .toArray(BoolVar[]::new));
1141	    }
1142	
1143	    /**
1144	     * 创建"集合中至少一个被选中"的条件变量和约束
1145	     * 
1146	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
1147	     * @param paraVar           参数变量
1148	     * @param filterOptionCodes 过滤的选项代码列表
1149	     * @param conditionSuffix   条件后缀（如"leftCond"、"rightCond"）
1150	     * @return 条件变量
1151	     */
1152	    private BoolVar createSelectedCondition(String ruleCode, ParaVar paraVar,
1153	            List<String> filterOptionCodes, String conditionSuffix) {
1154	        // 定义条件变量
1155	        BoolVar condition = newBoolVar(f("%s_%s", ruleCode, conditionSuffix));
1156	
1157	        // 获取选中的选项
1158	        Literal[] selected = paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1159	                .filter(option -> filterOptionCodes.contains(option.getCode()))
1160	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1161	                .toArray(Literal[]::new);
1162	
1163	        // 当条件为true时，集合中至少一个被选中；当为false时，集合全部不被选中
1164	        model.addBoolOr(selected).onlyEnforceIf(condition);
1165	        model.addBoolAnd(Arrays.stream(selected).map(Literal::not).toArray(Literal[]::new))
1166	                .onlyEnforceIf(condition.not());
1167	
1168	        return condition;
1169	    }
1170	
1171	    /**
1172	     * 创建"集合外至少一个被选中"的条件变量和约束
1173	     * 
1174	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
1175	     * @param paraVar           参数变量
1176	     * @param filterOptionCodes 过滤的选项代码列表（这些选项不在集合内）
1177	     * @param conditionSuffix   条件后缀（如"leftNotCond"、"rightNotCond"）
1178	     * @return 条件变量
1179	     */
1180	    private BoolVar createNotSelectedCondition(String ruleCode, ParaVar paraVar,
1181	            List<String> filterOptionCodes, String conditionSuffix) {
1182	        // 定义条件变量
1183	        BoolVar condition = newBoolVar(f("%s_%s", ruleCode, conditionSuffix));
1184	
1185	        // 获取集合外选中的选项
1186	        Literal[] notSelected = paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1187	                .filter(option -> !filterOptionCodes.contains(option.getCode()))
1188	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1189	                .toArray(Literal[]::new);
1190	
1191	        // 当条件为true时，集合外至少一个被选中；当为false时，集合外全部不被选中
1192	        model.addBoolOr(notSelected).onlyEnforceIf(condition);
1193	        model.addBoolAnd(Arrays.stream(notSelected).map(Literal::not).toArray(Literal[]::new))
1194	                .onlyEnforceIf(condition.not());
1195	
1196	        return condition;
1197	    }
1198	
1199	    /**
1200	     * 设置部件为未选中状态（批量）
1201	     * 遍历调用 setPartUnSelected(Part part)
1202	     *
1203	     * @param parts 部件列表
1204	     */
1205	    public void setPartUnSelected(List<Part> parts) {
1206	        if (parts == null || parts.isEmpty()) {
1207	            return;
1208	        }
1209	        for (Part part : parts) {
1210	            setPartUnSelected(part);
1211	        }
1212	    }
1213	
1214	    /**
1215	     * 设置部件为未选中状态
1216	     * 根据 part.code 找到对应 partVar，使用 ortools 设置：
1217	     * - partVar.isSelected == 0
1218	     * - partVar.qty == 0
1219	     *
1220	     * @param part 部件
1221	     */
1222	    public void setPartUnSelected(Part part) {
1223	        if (part == null) {
1224	            log.warn("Part is null, cannot set unselected");
1225	            return;
1226	        }
1227	
1228	        // 根据 part.code 找到对应 partVar
1229	        PartVar partVar = getPartVar(part.getCode());
1230	
1231	        // 使用 ortools 设置约束
1232	        // partVar.isSelected == 0
1233	        model.addEquality(partVar.getIsSelected(), 0);
1234	
1235	        // partVar.qty == 0
1236	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), 0);
1237	
1238	        log.info("Set part unselected: code={}, isSelected=0, qty=0", part.getCode());
1239	    }
1240	
1241	    public List<PartVar> getAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
1242	        if (filterConditionStr == null || filterConditionStr.isEmpty()) {
1243	            return new ArrayList<>(partMap.values());
1244	        } else {
1245	            return FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(new ArrayList<>(partMap.values()), filterConditionStr);
1246	        }
1247	    }
1248	
1249	    /**
1250	     * 过滤所有部件变量
1251	     * 
1252	     * @param filterConditionStr
1253	     * @return 第一个是过滤后，第一个没有过滤的
1254	     */
1255	    public Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> filterAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
1256	        List<PartVar> filterPartVars = getAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
1257	        Set<String> filterPartVarCodes = filterPartVars.stream().map(PartVar::getCode).collect(Collectors.toSet());
1258	        List<PartVar> noFilterPartVars = new ArrayList<>();
1259	        for (PartVar partVar : partMap.values()) {
1260	            if (!filterPartVarCodes.contains(partVar.getCode())) {
1261	                noFilterPartVars.add(partVar);
1262	            }
1263	        }
1264	        return Pair.of(filterPartVars, noFilterPartVars);
1265	    }
1266	
1267	    public String toString() {
1268	        return this.module.getCode();
1269	    }
1270	}
1271
```
</details></tool-use>
