```text
49	/**
50	 * 模块约束执行器实现类
51	 * 实现ModuleConstraintExecutor接口，提供约束求解的核心功能
52	 * 
53	 * @since 2025-09-22
54	 */
55	@Slf4j
56	public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {
57	
58	    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();
59	
60	    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();
61	
62	    private final List<ExtensibleProcess> extensibleProcesses = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();
63	
64	    private ConstraintConfig config;
65	
66	    @Override
67	    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
68	        this.config = config;
69	        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
70	        return Result.success(null);
71	    }
72	
73	    @Override
74	    public final Result<Void> fini() {
75	        // 销毁所有扩展处理器
76	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
77	            process.destroy();
78	        }
79	        extensibleProcesses.clear();
80	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
81	        moduleMap.clear();
82	        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
83	        return Result.success(null);
84	    }
85	
86	    @Override
87	    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
88	        if (modules == null) {
89	            return Result.failed("modules is null");
90	        }
91	        for (Module m : modules) {
92	            if (m == null) {
93	                continue;
94	            }
95	            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
96	            m.init();
97	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
98	            loader.init();
99	            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
100	        }
101	        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
102	        return Result.success(null);
103	    }
104	
105	    @Override
106	    public Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId) {
107	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.remove(moduleId);
108	        moduleMap.remove(moduleId);
109	        log.info("Removed module: {}", moduleId);
110	        return Result.success(null);
111	    }
112	
113	    @Override
114	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
115	        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
116	    }
117	
118	    private Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizePartConstraint(List<PartConstraintReq> orgReqs,
119	            IModule module) {
120	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizedReqs = new HashMap<>();
121	        if (orgReqs == null) {
122	            return normalizedReqs;
123	        }
124	        for (PartConstraintReq orgReq : orgReqs) {
125	            List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode());
126	            if (reqs == null) {
127	                reqs = new ArrayList<>();
128	                normalizedReqs.put(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode(), reqs);
129	            }
130	            normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode()).add(orgReq);
131	        }
132	
133	        // 标准化， 1、每个rootCategory只有1个， 2、属于同一个rootCategory的PartConstraintReq，合并在一起
134	        // 3、原始需求中针对子的要转换为rootCategory
135	        return normalizedReqs;
136	    }
137	
138	    /**
139	     * 处理部件分类约束
140	     *
141	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
142	     * @return 推理结果
143	     */
144	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> processProduct(Module startModule, InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
145	        try {
146	            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
147	
148	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(
149	                    partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs(), startModule);
150	            // 查找原始部件分类
151	            Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap);
152	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());
153	
154	            Module filterModule = filterResult.getFirst();
155	            log.info("Priority-orignal module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(startModule));
156	            log.info("Priority-filter module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(filterModule));
157	            SolverResult sr = null;
158	            // 检查是否有优先级规则，如果有则使用分级求解
159	            if (filterModule.hasAllPriorityRule()) {
160	                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
161	            } else {
162	                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
163	            }
164	            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());
165	
166	        } catch (Exception e) {
167	            log.error("Failed to process Module constraint", e);
168	            return Result.failed("Failed to process Module constraint: " + e.getMessage());
169	        }
170	    }
171	
172	    public static Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterClone(Module startModule,
173	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap) {
174	        Module result = startModule.clone();
175	        List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
176	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = null;
177	        PartCategory filterPartCategory = null;
178	        for (PartCategory partCategory : startModule.getPartCategorys()) {
179	            reqs = partConstraintReqMap.get(partCategory.getCode());
180	            if (reqs == null) {
181	                // 如果是穷举多实例的情况，默认是放进去的，TODO：是不是一个也没有的时候也补充一个
182	                if (partCategory.isEnumMutiInst()) {
183	                    continue;
184	                }
185	                result.addPart(partCategory); // 完全挪过来
186	            } else {
187	                if (reqs.size() == 1) {
188	                    PartConstraintReq req = reqs.get(0);
189	                    filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
190	                    String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
191	                            filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
192	                            req.getAttrWhereCondition());
193	                    log.info(msg);
194	                    if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
195	                        throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
196	                    }
197	                    // result.addPart(filterPartCategory);
198	                    result.addPartCategory(filterPartCategory);
199	                    PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
200	                            .toPartCategoryInput(
201	                                    filterPartCategory, req);
202	                    partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum));
203	                    partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
204	                } else {
205	                    Pair<List<Rule>, List<Rule>> rulePair = RuleUtils.splitRules(partCategory.getRules());
206	                    List<AttrPara> sumsumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.SumSum);
207	                    List<AttrPara> sumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum);
208	
209	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = new MultiInstPartCategoryInput();
210	                    int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
211	                    for (PartConstraintReq req : reqs) {
212	                        if (req.getAttrType() == AttrParaType.SumSum) { // 总总的要求
213	                            PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.setPartCategoryInputBase(multiInstPartCategoryInput,
214	                                    req);
215	                            continue;
216	                        }
217	                        filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
218	                        String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
219	                                filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
220	                                req.getAttrWhereCondition());
221	                        log.info(msg);
222	                        if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
223	                            throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
224	                        }
225	                        filterPartCategory.setRules(rulePair.getFirst());
226	                        PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
227	                                .toPartCategoryInput(
228	                                        filterPartCategory, req);
229	                        partCategoryInput.setInstId(instId++);
230	                        partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(sumAttrParas);
231	                        multiInstPartCategoryInput.addPartCategoryInput(partCategoryInput);
232	                    }
233	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setAllInstRules(rulePair.getSecond());
234	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setSumSumAttrParas(sumsumAttrParas);
235	                    result.addPartCategory(partCategory); // 放的是全的
236	                    partCategoryInputs.add(multiInstPartCategoryInput);
237	                }
238	            }
239	        }
240	        return new Pair<>(result, partCategoryInputs);
241	    }
242	
243	    @Override
244	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req) {
245	        if (req == null) {
246	            return Result.failed("req is null");
247	        }
248	        if (req.getPartConstraintReqs() == null || req.getPartConstraintReqs().isEmpty()) {
249	            return inferParasOld(req);
250	        }
251	        try {
252	            // 获取基础数据
253	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
254	            module.init();
255	
256	            // 创建部件分类约束执行器
257	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
258	            if (loader == null) {
259	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
260	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " + module.getId());
261	            }
262	            ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl baseExecutor = null;
263	            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = null;
264	            InferPartCategoryReq cReq = toInferPartCategoryReq(req);
265	            if (!Strings.isNullOrEmpty(cReq.getPartCategoryCode())) {
266	                baseExecutor = new PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl();
267	            } else {
268	                baseExecutor = this;
269	            }
270	            baseExecutor.init(module, config, loader);
271	            result = baseExecutor.doProcess(cReq);
272	
273	            return result;
274	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
275	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
276	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
277	        }
278	    }
279	
280	    private Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParasOld(InferParasReq req) {
281	        if (req == null) {
282	            return Result.failed("req is null");
283	        }
284	        try {
285	            // 获取基础数据
286	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
287	            module.init();
288	
289	            // 获取模块算法类加载器并初始化执行器
290	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
291	            if (loader == null) {
292	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
293	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " +
294	                        module.getId());
295	            }
296	            this.init(module, config, loader);
297	
298	            // 执行约束推理
299	            RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
300	            CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
301	            ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = result.getSolutionCallBack();
302	
303	            // 如果模型无效，调用ValidateCpModel获取详细错误信息
304	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.MODEL_INVALID) {
305	                // 重新获取模型进行验证
306	                ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
307	                AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
308	                String validationError = model.getCpModel().validate();
309	                log.error("Model validation failed: {}", validationError);
310	                return Result.failed("Model validation failed: " + validationError);
311	            }
312	
313	            if (status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
314	                    && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
315	                return Result.failed("solver status: " + status);
316	            }
317	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE && config.isDebugByRelaxVar()) {
318	                // 没有可行解，如果 debugByRelaxVar= true，则使用松弛变量检测冲突规则
319	                Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> rcResult = null;
320	                List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
321	
322	                // 第一次运行
323	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
324	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
325	
326	                // 第二次运行，使用第一次的冲突结果
327	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
328	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
329	
330	                Result<List<ModuleInst>> r = Result.noSolution(toConfictMessage(confictedRelaxs));
331	
332	                // 最后一次solution的解
333	                List<ModuleInst> solutions = rcResult.getSecond().getSolutionCallBack().getSolverResult()
334	                        .getSolutions();
335	                r.setData(solutions);
336	                return r;
337	            }
338	
339	            // 执行后处理
340	            List<ModuleInst> solutions = cb.getSolverResult().getSolutions();
341	            solutions = executePostProcess(module, solutions);
342	
343	            return Result.success(solutions);
344	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
345	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
346	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
347	        }
348	    }
349	
350	    @Override
351	    public Result<Void> registerExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
352	        if (eProcess == null) {
353	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
354	        }
355	        if (extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
356	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess already registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
357	            return Result.success(null);
358	        }
359	        Result<Void> initResult = eProcess.init();
360	        if (initResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS) {
361	            return Result.failed("Failed to initialize extensible process: " + initResult.getMessage());
362	        }
363	        extensibleProcesses.add(eProcess);
364	        // 按优先级排序
365	        extensibleProcesses.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(ExtensibleProcess::getPriority));
366	        log.info("Registered extensible process: {} with priority: {}",
367	                eProcess.getProcessName(), eProcess.getPriority());
368	        return Result.success(null);
369	    }
370	
371	    @Override
372	    public Result<Void> unregisterExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
373	        if (eProcess == null) {
374	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
375	        }
376	        if (!extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
377	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess not registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
378	            return Result.success(null);
379	        }
380	        eProcess.destroy();
381	        extensibleProcesses.remove(eProcess);
382	        log.info("Unregistered extensible process: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
383	        return Result.success(null);
384	    }
385	
386	    /**
387	     * 根据模块ID获取模块算法类加载器
388	     * 
389	     * @param moduleId 模块ID
390	     * @return 找到的ModuleAlgClassLoader对象，如果未找到则返回null
391	     */
392	    private ModuleAlgClassLoader getModuleClassLoader(Long moduleId) {
393	        return moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.get(moduleId);
394	    }
395	
396	    /**
397	     * 计算冲突规则
398	     *
399	     * @param result 运行推理参数响应
400	     * @return 冲突松弛变量列表
401	     */
402	    private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
403	        AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
404	        // 获取冲突规则信息
405	        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
406	        Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
407	        for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
408	            RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
409	            if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
410	                confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
411	            }
412	        }
413	        return confictedRelaxs;
414	    }
415	
416	    /**
417	     * 将冲突松弛变量列表转换为冲突消息字符串
418	     *
419	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
420	     * @return 冲突消息字符串
421	     */
422	    private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
423	        StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
424	        for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
425	            conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
426	        }
427	        return conflictMessage.toString();
428	    }
429	
430	    private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
431	            InferParasReq req,
432	            boolean isAttachRelax,
433	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {
434	
435	        RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
436	        CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
437	        if (isFailed(status)) {
438	            throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
439	        }
440	        List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
441	        return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);
442	
443	    }
444	
445	    /**
446	     * 检查求解器状态是否失败
447	     *
448	     * @param status 求解器状态
449	     * @return 是否失败
450	     */
451	    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
452	        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
453	                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
454	                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
455	    }
456	
457	    /**
458	     * 执行约束推理
459	     * 
460	     * @param module          模块对象
461	     * @param req             参数反推请求
462	     * @param isAttachRelax   是否附加松弛变量
463	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
464	     * @return 包含求解器状态和回调对象的RunInferParasRsp
465	     * @throws AlgLoaderException   当算法加载器未找到时抛出
466	     * @throws AlgExecutorException 当创建算法执行时抛出
467	     */
468	    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
469	            InferParasReq req,
470	            boolean isAttachRelax,
471	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
472	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
473	        // 初始化约束模型
474	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
475	        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
476	
477	        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
478	            // 将module的CpModelProto信息输出到文件config.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
479	            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
480	        }
481	        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
482	        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
483	        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // 单线程搜索，防止有重复解
484	        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
485	            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
486	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
487	        }
488	        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
489	        // 可按需设置更多参数
490	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
491	        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
492	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
493	        model.printModelSummary();
494	        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
495	    }
496	
497	    private ModuleAlgImpl initConstraintModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
498	            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
499	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
500	        // 创建约束算法实例
501	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
502	        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
503	        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
504	        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
505	        // 根据loadType决定是否使用差量加载模型
506	        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
507	            // 差量加载模型
508	            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);
509	
510	            // 查询子图
511	            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
512	                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));
513	
514	            // 打印relativePair.first,relativePair.second, 本次推理涉及到exeRules和exeProgObjs
515	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
516	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
517	                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
518	                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));
519	
520	            // 调用新的initModel方法,issue:差量后续实现
521	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
522	        } else {
523	            // 全量加载模型
524	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
525	        }
526	
527	        // // 根据请求初始化约束模型
528	        // initModelByReq(req, alg);
529	
530	        // 添加松弛目标函数, 方便调试
531	        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
532	        return alg;
533	    }
534	
535	    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
536	        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
537	        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
538	        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
539	        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
540	        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
541	        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
542	        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
543	        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
544	        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
545	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
546	                startModule);
547	        Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
548	                partConstraintReqMap);
549	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());
550	        return moduleInput;
551	    }
552	
553	    /**
554	     * 将InferParasReq转换为InferPartCategoryReq
555	     * 
556	     * @param req 参数反推请求
557	     * @return 部件分类请求
558	     */
559	    private InferPartCategoryReq toInferPartCategoryReq(InferParasReq req) {
560	        InferPartCategoryReq cReq = new InferPartCategoryReq();
561	        cReq.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
562	        cReq.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
563	        cReq.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
564	        cReq.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
565	        cReq.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
566	        return cReq;
567	    }
568	
569	    /**
570	     * 根据模块ID或模块代码获取模块对象
571	     * 
572	     * @param moduleId   模块ID，可为null
573	     * @param moduleCode 模块代码，可为null
574	     * @return 找到的模块对象，如果未找到则返回null
575	     */
576	    private Module getModule(Long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
577	        if (moduleId != null) {
578	            return moduleMap.get(moduleId);
579	        }
580	        if (moduleCode != null) {
581	            for (Module m : moduleMap.values()) {
582	                if (moduleCode.equals(m.getCode())) {
583	                    return m;
584	                }
585	            }
586	        }
587	        log.error("Module not found: moduleId={}, moduleCode={}", moduleId, moduleCode);
588	        throw new AlgLoaderException(
589	                String.format("Module not found: moduleId=%s, moduleCode=%s", moduleId, moduleCode));
590	    }
591	
592	    /**
593	     * 执行后处理
594	     * 
595	     * @param module    模块
596	     * @param solutions 原始解决方案
597	     * @return 处理后的解决方案
598	     */
599	    private List<ModuleInst> executePostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
600	        List<ModuleInst> result = solutions;
601	
602	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
603	            if (process instanceof InferParasPostProcess) {
604	                result = applyPostProcess(module, result, (InferParasPostProcess) process);
605	            }
606	        }
607	
608	        return result;
609	    }
610	
611	    /**
612	     * 应用单个后处理流程
613	     * 
614	     * @param module        模块
615	     * @param currentResult 当前结果
616	     * @param postProcess   后处理流程
617	     * @return 处理后的结果
618	     */
619	    private List<ModuleInst> applyPostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> currentResult,
620	            InferParasPostProcess postProcess) {
621	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> processResult = postProcess.postProcess(module, currentResult);
622	        if (processResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS || processResult.getData() == null) {
623	            log.warn("Post process failed: {}, message: {}",
624	                    postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName(), processResult.getMessage());
625	            return currentResult;
626	        }
627	        log.info("Applied post process: {} successfully", postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName());
628	        return processResult.getData();
629	    }
630	
631	    /**
632	     * 将ModuleInst对象转换为JSON字符串
633	     * 
634	     * @param inst ModuleInst实例
635	     * @return JSON字符串
636	     */
637	    public static String toJson(ModuleInst inst) {
638	        try {
639	            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
640	            mapper.setPropertyNamingStrategy(PropertyNamingStrategies.SNAKE_CASE);
641	            return mapper.writeValueAsString(inst);
642	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
643	            return "{\"error\": \"Serialization failed: " + e.getMessage() + "\"}";
644	        }
645	    }
646	
647	}
```

```text
95	    @Override

103	    /**
104	     * 查询满足条件的Part
105	     *
106	     * @param constraintReq 约束请求
107	     * @return 满足条件的PartCategory列表
108	     */
109	    public PartCategory filterClone(PartConstraintReq constraintReq) {
110	        return filterClone(this, constraintReq, false);
111	    }
112	
113	    private PartCategory filterClone(PartCategory category, PartConstraintReq constraintReq,
114	            boolean hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq) {
115	        PartCategory resultPartCategory = category.clone();
116	        if (!hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq) {
117	            if (constraintReq.getPartCategoryCode().equals(category.getCode())) {
118	                hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq = true;
119	            }
120	        }
121	        if (hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq && CollectionUtils.isEmpty(category.getPartCategorys())) {
122	            // 先匹配当前原子part
123	            List<Part> filterParts = querySubAtomicParts(category, constraintReq);
124	            resultPartCategory.addAtomicPartsWithoutStructure(filterParts);
125	        }
126	        // 在去自己的子分类中匹配
127	        for (PartCategory pc : category.getPartCategorys()) {
128	            resultPartCategory.addPart(filterClone(pc, constraintReq, hasMatchedPartCategoryOfReq));
129	        }
130	        return resultPartCategory;
131	    }
132	
133	    private List<Part> querySubAtomicParts(PartCategory category, PartConstraintReq constraintReq) {
134	        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition())) {
135	            return new ArrayList<>(category.getAtomicParts());
136	        }
137	        // 解析属性代码
138	        Pair<DynamicAttribute, String> attrResult = parseAttributeFromCondition(constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition(),
139	                category.getDynAttrSchemas());
140	
141	        List<Part> filterParts = new ArrayList<>();
142	        if (attrResult.getFirst().getInstType() == 0) { // 非实例属性
143	            // 过滤条件不涉及实例属性，直接在Part级别过滤
144	            filterParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(new ArrayList<>(category.getAtomicParts()),
145	                    constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition());
146	
147	        } else { // 实例属性
148	            for (Part part : category.getAtomicParts()) {
149	                InstanceDynAttrValue instAttrs = part.getInstanceAttrs();
150	                if (instAttrs == null) {
151	                    throw new IllegalStateException("Instance attributes not found for part: " + part.getCode());
152	                }
153	                List<InstanceDynAttrValueItem> instValues = FilterExpressionExecutor
154	                        .doSelect(instAttrs.getInstsValues(), constraintReq.getAttrWhereCondition());
155	                if (instValues.isEmpty()) {
156	                    continue;
157	                }
158	                Part cPart = part.clone(); // 带有实例属性，通过clone的方法，把属性的多实例值进行汇总，存储起来，方便后续调用。
159	                List<DynamicAttribute> instAttrsList = category.queryDynAttrSchemas4Inst();
160	                for (DynamicAttribute instAttr : instAttrsList) {
161	                    String sumAttrValue = null;
162	                    switch (instAttr.getDynAttrType().getBaseType()) {
163	                        case INT:
164	                            sumAttrValue = sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Int(part, instValues, instAttr.getCode());
165	                            cPart.setAttr(instAttr.getCode(), sumAttrValue);
166	                            break;
167	                        case FLOAT:
168	                            sumAttrValue = sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Float(part, instValues, instAttr.getCode());
169	                            cPart.setAttr(instAttr.getCode(), sumAttrValue);
170	                            break;
171	                        case DOUBLE:
172	                            sumAttrValue = sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Double(part, instValues, instAttr.getCode());
173	                            cPart.setAttr(instAttr.getCode(), sumAttrValue);
174	                            break;
175	                        default:
176	                            log.warn("Unsupported base type for aggregation: {} in part: {}",
177	                                    instAttr.getDynAttrType().getBaseType(), part.getCode());
178	                            break;
179	                    }
180	                }
181	                filterParts.add(cPart);
182	            }
183	        }
184	        return filterParts;
185	    }

224	    /**
225	     * 检查属性是否为实例属性
226	     *
227	     * @param attrCode       属性代码
228	     * @param dynAttrSchemas 动态属性schema列表
229	     * @return 如果是实例属性则返回true，否则返回false
230	     */
231	    @JsonIgnore
232	    private boolean isInstanceAttribute(String attrCode, List<DynamicAttribute> dynAttrSchemas) {
233	        for (DynamicAttribute attr : dynAttrSchemas) {
234	            if (attr.getCode().equals(attrCode) && attr.getInstType() == 1) {
235	                return true;
236	            }
237	        }
238	        return false;
239	    }
240	
241	    /**
242	     * 从过滤条件中解析属性
243	     *
244	     * @param whereCondition 过滤条件字符串
245	     * @param dynAttrSchemas 动态属性schema列表
246	     * @return 属性和操作符的配对
247	     */
248	    @JsonIgnore
249	    public Pair<DynamicAttribute, String> parseAttributeFromCondition(String whereCondition,
250	            List<DynamicAttribute> dynAttrSchemas) {
251	        Optional<FilterCondition> filterConditionOpt = FilterExpressionExecutor.parseFilterExpression(whereCondition);
252	        if (!filterConditionOpt.isPresent()) {
253	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid filter condition format: " + whereCondition);
254	        }
255	
256	        FilterCondition filterCondition = filterConditionOpt.get();
257	        String fieldName = filterCondition.getFieldName();
258	
259	        DynamicAttribute attr = getAttribute(fieldName, dynAttrSchemas);
260	        return Pair.of(attr, AttrFunConstant.FUN_PREFIX_EMPTY);
261	    }
262	
263	    /**
264	     * 解析属性代码
265	     *
266	     * @param orgAttrCode    原始属性代码
267	     * @param dynAttrSchemas 动态属性schema列表
268	     * @return 属性和函数的配对
269	     */
270	    @JsonIgnore
271	    public Pair<DynamicAttribute, String> parseAttribute(String orgAttrCode, List<DynamicAttribute> dynAttrSchemas) {
272	        // 解析逻辑，例如："Sum_Capacity" -> DynamicAttribute{Capacity}, "Sum"
273	        String funPrefix = "";
274	        String attrCode = orgAttrCode;
275	
276	        if (orgAttrCode.contains(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR)) {
277	            String[] parts = orgAttrCode.split(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR, 2);
278	            funPrefix = parts[0];
279	            attrCode = parts[1];
280	        }
281	
282	        DynamicAttribute attr = getAttribute(attrCode, dynAttrSchemas);
283	        return Pair.of(attr, funPrefix);
284	    }
285	
286	    /**
287	     * 根据属性代码查找动态属性
288	     *
289	     * @param attrCode       属性代码
290	     * @param dynAttrSchemas 动态属性schema列表
291	     * @return 找到的DynamicAttribute对象
292	     * @throws IllegalArgumentException 当属性未找到时抛出
293	     */
294	    @JsonIgnore
295	    public DynamicAttribute getAttribute(String attrCode, List<DynamicAttribute> dynAttrSchemas) {
296	        // 首先在动态属性schema列表中查找
297	        for (DynamicAttribute attr : dynAttrSchemas) {
298	            if (attr.getCode().equals(attrCode)) {
299	                return attr;
300	            }
301	        }
302	
303	        // 如果在schema列表中找不到，则在常量属性中查找
304	        DynamicAttribute cAttr = PartConstantAttr.getAttr(attrCode);
305	        if (cAttr != null) {
306	            return cAttr;
307	        }
308	
309	        // 如果都找不到，抛出异常
310	        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Attribute '" + attrCode + "' not found in schema");
311	    }
312	
313	    /**
314	     * 添加子部件列表
315	     *
316	     * @param subParts 子部件列表（可以是Part或PartCategory）
317	     */
318	    public void addSubParts(List<? extends IPart> subParts) {
319	        super.addParts(subParts);
320	    }
321	
322	    /**
323	     * 计算未过滤的叶子部件
324	     * 遍历 allPartCategory 本身的 parts 及其子 PartCategory 的 parts，
325	     * 如果不在 filterLeafParts 中，添加到结果列表
326	     *
327	     * @param allPartCategory 所有部件分类
328	     * @param filterLeafParts 已过滤的叶子部件列表
329	     * @return 未过滤的叶子部件列表
330	     */
331	    @JsonIgnore
332	    public static List<Part> calcUnFilterLeafParts(PartCategory allPartCategory, List<Part> filterLeafParts) {
333	        List<Part> unFilterLeafParts = new ArrayList<>();
334	        List<Part> allLeafParts = allPartCategory.getAtomicParts();
335	
336	        // 使用 Set 来快速查找，提高性能
337	        Set<String> filterPartCodes = filterLeafParts.stream()
338	                .map(Part::getCode)
339	                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
340	
341	        // 遍历所有叶子部件，如果不在 filterLeafParts 中，添加到 unFilterLeafParts
342	        for (Part part : allLeafParts) {
343	            if (!filterPartCodes.contains(part.getCode())) {
344	                unFilterLeafParts.add(part);
345	            }
346	        }
347	
348	        return unFilterLeafParts;
349	    }
350	
351	    /**
352	     * 对实例属性值进行整数类型求和
353	     *
354	     * @param part       部件对象
355	     * @param instValues 实例属性值列表
356	     * @param attrCode   属性代码
357	     * @return 求和后的字符串值
358	     */
359	    @JsonIgnore
360	    private String sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Int(Part part, List<InstanceDynAttrValueItem> instValues,
361	            String attrCode) {
362	        int sumAttrValue = 0;
363	        for (InstanceDynAttrValueItem instValue : instValues) {
364	            String attrValue = instValue.getInstAttr(attrCode);
365	            if (attrValue == null) {
366	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
367	                        "Attribute '" + attrCode + "' value is null for part '" + part.getCode() + "'");
368	            }
369	            try {
370	                sumAttrValue += Integer.parseInt(attrValue);
371	            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
372	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
373	                        "Invalid number format for attribute '" + attrCode + "' with value '" + attrValue
374	                                + "' in part '" + part.getCode() + "'",
375	                        e);
376	            }
377	        }
378	        return String.valueOf(sumAttrValue);
379	    }
380	
381	    /**
382	     * 对实例属性值进行浮点数类型求和
383	     *
384	     * @param part       部件对象
385	     * @param instValues 实例属性值列表
386	     * @param attrCode   属性代码
387	     * @return 求和后的字符串值
388	     */
389	    @JsonIgnore
390	    private String sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Float(Part part, List<InstanceDynAttrValueItem> instValues,
391	            String attrCode) {
392	        float sumAttrValue = 0.0f;
393	        for (InstanceDynAttrValueItem instValue : instValues) {
394	            String attrValue = instValue.getInstAttr(attrCode);
395	            if (attrValue == null) {
396	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
397	                        "Attribute '" + attrCode + "' value is null for part '" + part.getCode() + "'");
398	            }
399	            try {
400	                sumAttrValue += Float.parseFloat(attrValue);
401	            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
402	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
403	                        "Invalid number format for attribute '" + attrCode + "' with value '" + attrValue
404	                                + "' in part '" + part.getCode() + "'",
405	                        e);
406	            }
407	        }
408	        return String.valueOf(sumAttrValue);
409	    }
410	
411	    /**
412	     * 对实例属性值进行双精度浮点数类型求和
413	     *
414	     * @param part       部件对象
415	     * @param instValues 实例属性值列表
416	     * @param attrCode   属性代码
417	     * @return 求和后的字符串值
418	     */
419	    @JsonIgnore
420	    private String sumInstanceDynAttrValue4Double(Part part, List<InstanceDynAttrValueItem> instValues,
421	            String attrCode) {
422	        double sumAttrValue = 0.0;
423	        for (InstanceDynAttrValueItem instValue : instValues) {
424	            String attrValue = instValue.getInstAttr(attrCode);
425	            if (attrValue == null) {
426	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
427	                        "Attribute '" + attrCode + "' value is null for part '" + part.getCode() + "'");
428	            }
429	            try {
430	                sumAttrValue += Double.parseDouble(attrValue);
431	            } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
432	                throw new IllegalArgumentException(
433	                        "Invalid number format for attribute '" + attrCode + "' with value '" + attrValue
434	                                + "' in part '" + part.getCode() + "'",
435	                        e);
436	            }
437	        }
438	        return String.valueOf(sumAttrValue);
439	    }
440	
441	    /**
442	     * 获取原子部件的短字符串表示
443	     * 格式：Size:xx Codes: code1,code2,....（最多MAX_DISPLAY_CODES个代码）
444	     * 
445	     * @return 原子部件的短字符串表示
446	     */
447	    @JsonIgnore
448	    public String getAtomicPartShortString() {
449	        List<Part> atomicParts = getAtomicParts();
450	        return PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts);
451	    }
452	
453	    /**
454	     * 获取原子部件的短字符串表示
455	     * 格式：Size:xx Codes: code1,code2,....（最多MAX_DISPLAY_CODES个代码）
456	     * 
457	     * @return 原子部件的短字符串表示
458	     */
459	    @JsonIgnore
460	    public String getAllAtomicPartShortString() {
461	        List<Part> atomicParts = getAllAtomicParts();
462	        return PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts);
463	    }
464	
465	    @Override
466	    @JsonIgnore
467	    public boolean hasPriorityRule() {
468	        List<Rule> priorityRules = queryPriorityRules();
469	        return !priorityRules.isEmpty();
470	    }
471	
472	    @Override
473	    @JsonIgnore
474	    public List<Rule> queryPriorityRules() {
475	        List<Rule> priorityRules = new ArrayList<>();
476	        for (Rule rule : super.getRules()) {
477	            if (RuleTypeConstants.isPriorityRule(rule.getRuleSchemaTypeFullName())) {
478	                priorityRules.add(rule);
479	            }
480	        }
481	        return priorityRules;
482	    }
483	
484	    /**
485	     * 获取指定计算阶段的所有规则列表（包括子分类中的规则）
486	     * 递归收集所有子分类中的规则
487	     * 
488	     * @param calcStage 计算阶段
489	     * @return 指定计算阶段的所有规则列表
490	     */
491	    @Override
492	    @JsonIgnore
493	    public List<Rule> getAllRules(CalcStage calcStage) {
494	        if (calcStage == null) {
495	            return new ArrayList<>();
496	        }
497	        List<Rule> allRules = new ArrayList<>();
498	        // 添加当前分类的规则
499	        List<Rule> rules = getRules(calcStage);
500	        if (rules != null) {
501	            allRules.addAll(rules);
502	        }
503	        // 递归收集所有子分类中的规则
504	        for (PartCategory subCategory : partCategorys) {
505	            allRules.addAll(subCategory.getAllRules(calcStage));
506	        }
507	        return allRules;
508	    }
509	
510	    @Override
511	    public DynamicAttribute getDynAttrSchema(String code) {
512	        DynamicAttribute cAttr = getDynAttrSchemas().stream()
513	                .filter(attr -> code.equals(attr.getCode()))
514	                .findFirst()
515	                .orElse(null);
516	        if (cAttr != null) {
517	            return cAttr;
518	        }
519	        // 如果在schema列表中找不到，则在常量属性中查找
520	        cAttr = PartConstantAttr.getAttr(code);
521	        if (cAttr != null) {
522	            return cAttr;
523	        }
524	        return null;
525	    }
526	}
527
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.java`

```text
1	package com.jmix.executor.impl;
2	
3	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
4	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
5	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
6	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
7	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.SolverResult;
8	import com.jmix.executor.model.InferPartCategoryReq;
9	import com.jmix.executor.model.PartConstraintReq;
10	import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
11	
12	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
13	
14	import java.util.ArrayList;
15	import java.util.HashMap;
16	import java.util.HashSet;
17	import java.util.List;
18	import java.util.Map;
19	import java.util.Set;
20	
21	/**
22	 * 部件分类约束执行器实现类
23	 * 专门处理部件分类相关的约束求解
24	 *
25	 * @since 2025-01-XX
26	 */
27	@Slf4j
28	public class PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {
29	
30	    public PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl() {
31	    }
32	
33	    /**
34	     * 处理部件分类约束
35	     *
36	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
37	     * @return 推理结果
38	     */
39	    @Override
40	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
41	        try {
42	            // 查找原始部件分类
43	            PartCategory originalCategory = module.getPartCategory(partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
44	            if (originalCategory == null) {
45	                log.error("PartCategory not found: {}", partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
46	                return Result.failed("PartCategory not found: " + partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
47	            }
48	            log.info("Priority-orginal aparts: {}", originalCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString());
49	            // 遍历所有部件约束请求，逐步过滤
50	            PartCategory filteredCategory = originalCategory;
51	            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
52	            for (PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq : partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs()) {
53	                // 一条partConstraintReq会被拆分两条规则，一条是过滤规则（根据where条件过滤），一条是约束规则（根据attrCode,
54	                // attrComparator, attrValue构建约束表达式）
55	                // 查询满足条件的PartCategory
56	                filteredCategory = filteredCategory.filterClone(partConstraintReq);
57	                String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
58	                        filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
59	                        partConstraintReq.toShortString());
60	                log.info(msg);
61	                if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
62	                    return Result.noSolution(msg);
63	                }
64	                PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.toPartCategoryInput(
65	                        filteredCategory, partConstraintReq);
66	                partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
67	            }
68	            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
69	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(partCategoryInputs);
70	
71	            SolverResult sr = null;
72	            // 检查是否有优先级规则，如果有则使用分级求解
73	            Module moduleClone = module.clone();
74	
75	            if (filteredCategory.hasPriorityRule()) {
76	                PartCategory mergedFilteredCategory = buildMergedFilteredCategory(originalCategory,
77	                        partCategoryInputs);
78	                moduleClone.addPartCategory(mergedFilteredCategory);
79	                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(
80	                        moduleClone, moduleInput);
81	            } else {
82	                moduleClone.addPartCategory(filteredCategory);
83	                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(moduleClone, moduleInput);
84	            }
85	            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());
86	
87	        } catch (Exception e) {
88	            log.error("Failed to process part category constraint", e);
89	            return Result.failed("Failed to process part category constraint: " + e.getMessage());
90	        }
91	    }
92	
93	    /**
94	     * 将部件列表添加到合并的原子部件Map中
95	     *
96	     * @param mergedAtomicParts 合并的原子部件Map
97	     * @param parts             部件列表
98	     */
99	    private void addPartsToMap(Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts, List<Part> parts) {
100	        for (Part part : parts) {
101	            mergedAtomicParts.put(part.getCode(), part);
102	        }
103	    }
104	
105	    /**
106	     * 构建合并后的过滤分类
107	     * 仅支持两层结果，不构建结构
108	     * 使用扣除法原则：
109	     * - 含有父分类，则求并集
110	     * - 不含有父分类，补充没有在里面的子分类的部件
111	     *
112	     * @param originalCategory   原始部件分类
113	     * @param partCategoryInputs 部件约束列表
114	     * @return 合并后的过滤分类
115	     */
116	    private PartCategory buildMergedFilteredCategory(PartCategory originalCategory,
117	            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs) {
118	        // 实现案例
119	        // --drive PC
120	        // ----sd PC
121	        // -------sd1 part
122	        // -------sd2 part
123	        // -------sd3 part
124	        // ----md PC
125	        // -------md1 part
126	        // -------md2 part
127	        // -------md3 part
128	
129	        // 含有父，则求并集
130	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{drive-> md1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1}
131	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{drive-> sd1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2}
132	        // 不还原其层次结构
133	
134	        // 不含有父，补充没有在里面的子分类的部件
135	        // input1: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{md->md1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1} // 各个孩子都有
136	        // *input2: req1:{sd->sd1,sd2} req2:{sd->sd1} --> mReq={sd1,sd2,md1,md2,md3} 补充
137	
138	        Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts = new HashMap<>();
139	        Set<String> allPartCategoryCodes = new HashSet<>();
140	
141	        // 收集所有约束请求的分类代码和原子部件
142	        for (PartCategoryInputBase ipt : partCategoryInputs) {
143	            if (!(ipt instanceof PartCategoryInput)) {
144	                log.warn("ipt is not PartCategoryInput, code: " + ipt.getPartCategoryCode());
145	                continue;
146	            }
147	            PartCategoryInput partConstraint = (PartCategoryInput) ipt;
148	            String categoryCode = partConstraint.getOrgReq().getPartCategoryCode();
149	            allPartCategoryCodes.add(categoryCode);
150	            // 合并原子部件
151	            List<Part> atomicParts = partConstraint.getFilteredCategory().getAllAtomicParts();
152	            addPartsToMap(mergedAtomicParts, atomicParts);
153	        }
154	
155	        // 判断父分类是否包含在allPartCategoryCodes中
156	        if (!allPartCategoryCodes.contains(originalCategory.getCode())) {
157	            // 要把没有包含的子分类的部件补充上
158	            List<PartCategory> partCategoryList = originalCategory.getPartCategorys();
159	            for (PartCategory subPartCategory : partCategoryList) {
160	                if (!allPartCategoryCodes.contains(subPartCategory.getCode())) {
161	                    // 补充未包含的子分类的所有原子部件
162	                    List<Part> subAtomicParts = subPartCategory.getAllAtomicParts();
163	                    addPartsToMap(mergedAtomicParts, subAtomicParts);
164	                }
165	            }
166	        }
167	        // 克隆原始分类并添加合并的部件
168	        PartCategory resultCategory = originalCategory.clone();
169	        resultCategory.addAtomicPartsWithoutStructure(new ArrayList<>(mergedAtomicParts.values()));
170	        return resultCategory;
171	    }
172	
173	}
174
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\cmodel\ModuleInst.java`

```text
1	package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;
2	
3	import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
4	import com.google.common.base.Strings;
5	
6	import lombok.Data;
7	import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
8	
9	import java.util.ArrayList;
10	import java.util.List;
11	
12	/**
13	 * 模块实例类
14	 * 表示模块的一个具体实例，包含参数实例和部件实例
15	 *
16	 * @since 2025-09-22
17	 */
18	@Data
19	@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
20	public class ModuleInst extends ModuleBaseInst {
21	
22	    /**
23	     * 默认实例配置ID常量
24	     */
25	    public static final String DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID = "0";
26	
27	    /**
28	     * 默认数量常量
29	     */
30	    public static final int DEFAULT_QUANTITY = 1;
31	
32	    /**
33	     * 模块ID
34	     */
35	    private Long id;
36	
37	    /**
38	     * 实例配置ID
39	     */
40	    private String instanceConfigId = DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID;
41	
42	    /**
43	     * 数量
44	     */
45	    private Integer quantity = DEFAULT_QUANTITY;
46	
47	    /**
48	     * 部件分类实例列表
49	     */
50	    private List<PartCategoryInst> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
51	
52	    /**
53	     * 优先级属性值列表
54	     * 每个约束的值
55	     */
56	    private List<PriorityAttrValue> priorityAttrValues = new ArrayList<>();
57	
58	    /**
59	     * 优先级排序号
60	     */
61	    private int prioritySortNo = 0;
62	
63	    /**
64	     * 优先级综合值
65	     * 最后综合的值
66	     */
67	    private double priorityOverallValue = 0.0;
68	
69	    /**
70	     * 获取所有部件实例（当前层 + 所有子PartCategoryInst的部件）
71	     *
72	     * @return 所有部件实例列表
73	     */
74	    @JsonIgnore
75	    public List<PartInst> getAllParts() {
76	        List<PartInst> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
77	        // 添加当前层的部件
78	        allParts.addAll(getParts());
79	        // 递归添加所有子PartCategoryInst的部件
80	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
81	            allParts.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllParts());
82	        }
83	        return allParts;
84	    }
85	
86	    /**
87	     * 获取所有部件分类实例
88	     *
89	     * @return 所有部件分类实例列表
90	     */
91	    @JsonIgnore
92	    public List<PartCategoryInst> getAllPartCategorys() {
93	        List<PartCategoryInst> allPartCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
94	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
95	            allPartCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
96	            allPartCategorys.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllPartCategorys());
97	        }
98	        return allPartCategorys;
99	    }
100	
101	    /**
102	     * 添加部件分类实例
103	     *
104	     * @param partCategoryInst 部件分类实例
105	     */
106	    public void addPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst) {
107	        partCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
108	    }
109	
110	    /**
111	     * 根据部件代码查询部件实例（从所有部件中查询）
112	     *
113	     * @param partCode 部件代码
114	     * @return 部件实例，如果不存在则返回null
115	     */
116	    @JsonIgnore
117	    public PartInst queryPart(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String partCode) {
118	        // 先在当前层查找
119	        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(partCategoryCode)) {
120	            return super.queryPart(partCode);
121	        }
122	        // 在当前层查找
123	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
124	            if (partCategoryInst.getCode().equals(partCategoryCode) && partCategoryInst.getInstanceId() == instId) {
125	                return partCategoryInst.queryPart(partCode);
126	            }
127	        }
128	        return null;
129	    }
130	
131	    /**
132	     * 添加优先级属性值信息到字符串构建器
133	     * 格式：PAs(CA:100,TA:200,....)，attrCode取前两位的大写字符
134	     *
135	     * @param sb 字符串构建器
136	     */
137	    public void appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
138	        sb.append(" PO:").append(priorityOverallValue);
139	        sb.append(" PS:").append(prioritySortNo);
140	        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
141	            return;
142	        }
143	        if (sb.length() > 0) {
144	            sb.append(",");
145	        }
146	        sb.append("PAs(");
147	        boolean first = true;
148	        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
149	            if (!first) {
150	                sb.append(",");
151	            }
152	            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode());
153	            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(priorityAttrValue.getOptimalValue());
154	            first = false;
155	        }
156	        sb.append(")");
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取优先级属性短编码字符串
161	     * 输出 attrCode 和 shortCode 的关系
162	     *
163	     * @return 优先级属性短编码字符串，格式：shortCode:attrCode，多个用逗号分隔
164	     */
165	    @JsonIgnore
166	    public String getPriorityAttrShortCodeStr() {
167	        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
168	            return "";
169	        }
170	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
171	        sb.append("PAs:priorityAttrValues ").append("PO:priorityOverallValue ")
172	                .append("PS:prioritySortNo");
173	        sb.append(" (");
174	        boolean first = true;
175	        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
176	            String attrCode = priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode();
177	            if (attrCode == null || attrCode.isEmpty()) {
178	                continue;
179	            }
180	            if (!first) {
181	                sb.append(",");
182	            }
183	            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(attrCode);
184	            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(attrCode);
185	            first = false;
186	        }
187	        sb.append(")");
188	        return sb.toString();
189	    }
190	
191	    /**
192	     * 将属性代码转换为短编码
193	     * 取 attrCode 的前两位，转换为大写
194	     *
195	     * @param attrCode 属性代码
196	     * @return 短编码，如果 attrCode 为 null 或长度不足则返回空字符串
197	     */
198	    private String toAttrShortCode(String attrCode) {
199	        if (attrCode == null) {
200	            return "";
201	        }
202	        if (attrCode.length() >= 2) {
203	            return attrCode.substring(0, 2).toUpperCase();
204	        }
205	        return attrCode.toUpperCase();
206	    }
207	
208	    /**
209	     * 生成短字符串表示（包含优先级信息）
210	     *
211	     * @param isSimple 是否使用简单格式
212	     * @return 短字符串
213	     */
214	    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple) {
215	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
216	        // 当前模块本身的
217	        sb.append(super.toShortString(isSimple, 0));
218	        toShortString(sb, isSimple, this.getPartCategorys());
219	        // 添加优先级属性值信息
220	        appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(sb);
221	        return sb.toString();
222	    }
223	
224	    private void toShortString(StringBuilder sb, boolean isSimple, List<PartCategoryInst> pCategoryInsts) {
225	        // 分类的
226	        int index = 0;
227	        for (PartCategoryInst partCategory : this.partCategorys) {
228	            index++;
229	            sb.append(partCategory.toShortString(isSimple, partCategory.getInstanceId()));
230	            if (!(index == this.partCategorys.size())) { // isLast
231	                sb.append(",");
232	            }
233	        }
234	    }
235	}
236
```

```text
47	/**
48	 * 模块算法实现类
49	 * 实现ConstraintAlg接口，提供约束求解的具体实现
50	 * 继承自ModuleBaseAlgImpl，支持模块级别和部件分类级别的求和操作
51	 *
52	 * @since 2025-04-05
53	 */
54	@Slf4j
55	public class ModuleAlgImpl extends ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements IModuleAlg {
56	
57	    /**
58	     * 部件分类算法实例映射表
59	     */
60	    protected Map<String, PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgs = new LinkedHashMap<>();
61	
62	    // 左表达式部件分类算法实例，仅针对oneMany规则
63	    private SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
64	    // 右表达式部件分类算法实例，仅针对oneMany规则
65	    private SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
66	    // 当前规则后缀，仅针对oneMany规则
67	    private String currrentRulePostName = "";
68	
69	    /**
70	     * 初始化模块算法实例
71	     * 按partCategoryCode对partCategoryInputs进行分组，然后初始化本层和子层的变量与规则
72	     * 重写基类方法，添加PartCategoryAlgImpl的初始化
73	     *
74	     * @param model              CP约束模型
75	     * @param module             模块对象
76	     * @param partCategoryInputs 来自请求的部件约束列表
77	     */
78	    public void init(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
79	            ModuleInput moduleInput) {
80	        initData(model, module, moduleInput, this);
81	
82	        afterInitData(this.module, this);
83	
84	        initInput();
85	
86	        // preCalculate
87	        preCalculate();
88	
89	        // apply decision strategies for ordering solution enumeration
90	        applyDecisionStrategies();
91	
92	        // midCalculate
93	        initRules(this, CalcStage.MID);
94	        // postCalculate
95	    }
96	
97	    // 重写父类的方法
98	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
99	        if (isOneManyRule(rule)) {
100	            executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
101	        } else {
102	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
103	        }
104	    }
105	
106	    private boolean isOneManyRule(Rule rule) {
107	        return rule.getLeftCardinality() == Cardinality.ONE && rule.getRightCardinality() == Cardinality.MANY;
108	    }
109	
110	    // 执行类似logicAB1(1-*)的用例
111	    private void executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
112	        String leftPartCategoryCode = rule.getLeftCategoryCode();
113	        String rightPartCategoryCode = rule.getRightCategoryCode();
114	        if (Strings.isEmpty(leftPartCategoryCode) || Strings.isEmpty(rightPartCategoryCode)) {
115	            log.error("leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
116	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
117	                    "leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
118	        }
119	        SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl leftPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) getPartCategoryAlg(
120	                leftPartCategoryCode);
121	        PartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImpl = getPartCategoryAlg(
122	                rightPartCategoryCode);
123	        if (leftPartCategoryAlgImpl == null || rightPartCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
124	            log.error("leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
125	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
126	                    "leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
127	        }
128	        if (rightPartCategoryAlgImpl instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) {
129	            MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl = (MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
130	            for (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem : multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl
131	                    .getPartCategoryInsts()) {
132	
133	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
134	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem;
135	                currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
136	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
137	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
138	                super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
139	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
140	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
141	            }
142	        } else {
143	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
144	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
145	            currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
146	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
147	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
148	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
149	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
150	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
151	        }
152	
153	    }
154	
155	    private ModuleInput getModuleInput() {
156	        return (ModuleInput) this.moduleInput;
157	    }
158	
159	    protected void initInput() {
160	        super.initInput(this);
161	
162	        // 本模块的初始化
163	        ModuleInput req = getModuleInput();
164	        if (req.getMainPartInst() != null) {
165	            this.addPartEquality(req.getMainPartInst().getCode(), req.getMainPartInst().getQuantity());
166	        }
167	        if (req.getPreParaInsts() != null) {
168	            for (ParaInst paraInst : req.getPreParaInsts()) {
169	                this.addParaEquality(paraInst.getCode(), paraInst.getValue());
170	            }
171	        }
172	        if (req.getPrePartInsts() != null) {
173	            for (PartInst partInst : req.getPrePartInsts()) {
174	                this.addPartEquality(partInst.getCode(), partInst.getQuantity());
175	            }
176	        }
177	
178	        // 分类的input初始化
179	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
180	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
181	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initInput(this);
182	        }
183	
184	    }
185

187	     * 初始化Module后
188	     * 
189	     * @param module
190	     * @param moduleAlg
191	     */
192	    protected void afterInitData(IModule module, IModuleAlg moduleAlg) {
193	
194	    }
195	
196	    private void preCalculate() {
197	        log.info("preCalculate: module={}", getModule().getCode());
198	        // 暂时支持模块级前置计算，主要是对控制变量进行初始化
199	        if (!(module instanceof Module)) {
200	            return;
201	        }
202	        initRules(this, CalcStage.PRE);
203	    }
204	
205	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
206	            ModuleInput moduleInput,
207	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
208	        // 调用基类初始化
209	        super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, this);
210	
211	        // 按partCategoryCode对partCategoryInputs进行分组
212	        Map<String, PartCategoryInputBase> partConstraintFromReqMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
213	        for (PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput : moduleInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
214	            partConstraintFromReqMap.put(partCategoryInput.getPartCategoryCode(), partCategoryInput);
215	        }
216	
217	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
218	        if (module instanceof Module) {
219	            Module bModule = (Module) module;
220	            for (PartCategory partCategory : bModule.getPartCategorys()) {
221	                String categoryCode = partCategory.getCode();
222	                PartCategoryInputBase pc4partCategoryInput = partConstraintFromReqMap
223	                        .get(categoryCode);
224	                ModuleBaseAlgImpl pcAlg = null;
225	                if (pc4partCategoryInput == null) {
226	                    // No constraint for this PartCategory, create a default input
227	                    PartCategoryInput defaultInput = new PartCategoryInput();
228	                    defaultInput.setFilteredCategory(partCategory);
229	                    pc4partCategoryInput = defaultInput;
230	                }
231	                if (partCategory.isSupportMultiInst() && pc4partCategoryInput instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
232	                    pcAlg = new MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
233	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) pc4partCategoryInput;
234	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) multiInstPartCategoryInput, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
235	                } else {
236	                    pcAlg = new SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
237	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) partCategory, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
238	                }
239	                partCategoryAlgs.put(categoryCode, (PartCategoryAlgImpl) pcAlg);
240	            }
241	        }
242	        log.info("ModuleAlgImpl initialized with {} partCategory algorithms", partCategoryAlgs.size());
243	    }
244	
245	    protected void initRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
246	        Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods = buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
247	        // 先本身这个模块的前置算法
248	
249	        // 先构建本模块的优先类规则
250	        buildPriorityConstraint(module);
251	
252	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
253	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
254	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
255	        }
256	
257	        // 执行本身这个模块的后置算法
258	        this.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
259	    }
260	
261	    /**
262	     * 是否有优先类规则
263	     * 
264	     * @return exr
265	     */
266	    public boolean hasPriorityRule() {
267	        return !getAllPriorityConstraintMap().isEmpty();
268	    }
269	
270	    private Map<String, PriorityConstraint> getAllPriorityConstraintMap() {
271	        // ruleCode -> PriorityConstraint
272	        Map<String, PriorityConstraint> priorityConstraints = new HashMap<>();
273	        if (getPriorityConstraint() != null) {
274	            priorityConstraints.put(getPriorityConstraint().getRule().getCode(), getPriorityConstraint());
275	        }
276	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
277	            PriorityConstraint priorityConstraint = ((ModuleBaseAlgImpl) partCategoryAlgImpl).getPriorityConstraint();
278	            if (priorityConstraint != null) {
279	                priorityConstraints.put(
280	                        priorityConstraint.getRule().getCode(), priorityConstraint);
281	            }
282	        }
283	        return priorityConstraints;
284	    }
285	
286	    /**
287	     * 获取所有的Priority合并后的表达式
288	     *
289	     * @return exr
290	     */
291	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr() {
292	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr mergedExpr = model.newPartLinearExpr("merged_priority_expr");
293	        for (PriorityConstraint pc : getAllPriorityConstraintMap().values()) {
294	            Rule rule = pc.getRule();
295	            PriorityRuleSchema schema = (PriorityRuleSchema) rule.getRawCode();
296	            PriorityStrategy strategy = schema.getPriorityStrategy();
297	            // int weight = schema.getWeight();
298	            int coff = strategy == PriorityStrategy.MAX ? -1 : 1;
299	            mergedExpr.addExpr(pc.getExpr(), coff);
300	        }
301	        return mergedExpr;
302	    }
303	
304	    /**
305	     * Update or create priority objective function for given attribute code.
306	     *
307	     * @param attrCode attribute code
308	     * @param expr     expression containing part-term metadata and numeric terms
309	     */
310	    public void updatePriorityObjectFuntion(String ruleCode, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
311	        if (ruleCode == null || ruleCode.isEmpty()) {
312	            log.warn("ruleCode is null or empty, skip updating priority objective");
313	            return;
314	        }
315	        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = getAllPriorityConstraintMap().get(ruleCode);
316	        if (pConstraint == null) {
317	            log.error("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: {}", ruleCode);
318	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: " + ruleCode);
319	        }
320	        pConstraint.setExpr(expr);
321	        log.info("Updated priority objective for ruleCode {}: expr={}", ruleCode,
322	                expr != null ? expr.toString() : "null");
323	    }

342	        String instPrefix = categoryCodeInstPrefix + String.valueOf(MultiInstCategoryUtils.INST_PREFIX_CHAR);
343	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = new ArrayList<>();
344	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgs.values()) {

348	        }

398	    /**
399	     * 添加不兼容性约束（部件级别）
400	     * 
401	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
402	     * @param leftPartsExprStr  左侧部件表达式字符串，格式如 "fatherCode=cpu:CoreNum=4"
403	     * @param rightPartsExprStr 右侧部件表达式字符串
404	     */
405	    public void inCompatible(String ruleCode, String leftPartsExprStr, String rightPartsExprStr) {
406	        PartsExpr left = filterPartExpr(leftPartsExprStr, true);
407	        PartsExpr right = filterPartExpr(rightPartsExprStr, false);
408	
409	        if (left.isEmpty4FilterPars() || right.isEmpty4FilterPars()) {
410	            log.info("Skip inCompatible constraint: {} - left or right filter is empty", ruleCode);
411	            return;
412	        }
413	
414	        compatibleConstraintAlg.addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(ruleCode + currrentRulePostName, left, right);
415	    }
416	
417	    private PartsExpr filterPartExpr(String partExprStr, boolean isLeft) {
418	        if (partExprStr == null || partExprStr.isEmpty()) {
419	            // 打日志，抛异常
420	            log.error("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
421	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
422	        }
423	        PartsExpr partsExpr = new PartsExpr();
424	        // 解析partCategoryCode和filterConditionStr
425	        String partCategoryCode = "";
426	        String filterConditionStr = "";
427	
428	        int colonIndex = partExprStr.indexOf(':');
429	        if (colonIndex > 0) {
430	            partCategoryCode = partExprStr.substring(0, colonIndex);
431	            filterConditionStr = partExprStr.substring(colonIndex + 1);
432	        } else {
433	            // 打日志，抛异常
434	            log.error("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
435	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
436	        }
437	
438	        partsExpr.setFilterConditionStr(filterConditionStr);
439	
440	        PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl = isLeft ? currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl
441	                : currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
442	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
443	            // 兼容以前的
444	            partCategoryAlgImpl = this.getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
445	        } else {
446	            if (!partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode().equals(partCategoryCode)) {
447	                // 打日志，抛异常
448	                log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
449	                throw new AlgLoaderException("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
450	            }
451	        }
452	
453	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
454	            // 打日志，抛异常
455	            log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
456	            return partsExpr;
457	        }
458	        // 转换为PartVar
459	        partsExpr.setPartVars(partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(""));
460	        Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.filterAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
461	        partsExpr.setFilterPartVars(partVars.getFirst());
462	        partsExpr.setNoFilterPartVars(partVars.getSecond());
463	        return partsExpr;
464	    }
465

467	    // * 解析部件表达式字符串
468	    // * 格式：fatherCode=xxx:filterCondition
469	    // *
470	    // * @param partExprStr 部件表达式字符串
471	    // * @return PartsExpr
```
