518	    // noFilterParts = subPart(atomicParts, filterParts);
519	    // }
520	
521	    // // 转换为PartVar
522	    // partsExpr.setPartVars(toPartVar(partCategoryAlgImpl, atomicParts));
523	    // partsExpr.setFilterPartVars(toPartVar(partCategoryAlgImpl, filterParts));
524	    // partsExpr.setNoFilterPartVars(toPartVar(partCategoryAlgImpl, noFilterParts));
525	    // return partsExpr;
526	    // }
527	
528	    /**
529	     * 将Part列表转换为PartVar列表
530	     * 
531	     * @param parts Part列表
532	     * @return PartVar列表
533	     */
534	    public List<PartVar> toFilterPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String filtedConditionStr) {
535	        List<Part> atomicParts = partCategoryAlgImpl.getAtomicParts();
536	        if (filtedConditionStr != null && !filtedConditionStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
537	            atomicParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, filtedConditionStr);
538	            log.info("Priority-Filtered parts: {} in sum4Parts", PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts));
539	        }
540	        return toPartVar(partCategoryAlgImpl, atomicParts);
541	    }
542	
543	    /**
544	     * 将Part列表转换为PartVar列表
545	     * 
546	     * @param parts Part列表
547	     * @return PartVar列表
548	     */
549	    public List<PartVar> toPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, List<Part> parts) {
550	        return parts.stream()
551	                .map(t -> toPartVar(
552	                        partCategoryAlgImpl, t))
553	                .filter(pv -> pv != null)
554	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
555	    }
556	
557	    /**
558	     * 将Part对象转换为PartVar
559	     * 
560	     * @param part Part对象
561	     * @return PartVar，如果不存在则返回null
562	     */
563	    public PartVar toPartVar(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, Part part) {
564	        PartVar partVar = partCategoryAlgImpl.getPartVar(part.getCode());
565	        if (partVar == null) {
566	            // 打日志，抛异常
567	            log.error("PartVar not found for code: {}", part.getCode());
568	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PartVar not found for code: " + part.getCode());
569	        }
570	        return partVar;
571	    }
572	
573	    /**
574	     * 通用的部件求和方法，根据指定的变量获取函数计算总和
575	     * 
576	     * @param cofAttrCode        属性代码，如果为null或空则使用默认值1
577	     * @param varGetter          从PartVar获取LinearArgument的函数（如getIsSelected或getQty）
578	     * @param varName            变量名称（如"isSelected"或"qty"），用于构建字符串表达式
579	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
580	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
581	     */
582	    // @Override
583	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Parts(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String cofAttrCode,
584	            Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String varName, String filtedConditionStr) {
585	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr = buildSumExpr(
586	                partCategoryAlgImpl,
587	                cofAttrCode, varName, varGetter,
588	                filtedConditionStr);
589	        return expr;
590	    }
591	
592	    /**
593	     * 对指定部件分类的部件求和（选中状态，支持多分类逗号分隔）
594	     * 
595	     * @param partCategoryCodesStr 部件分类代码，支持逗号分隔，如 "driveI0,driveI1"
596	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码
597	     * @param filtedConditionStr   过滤条件字符串
598	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
599	     */
600	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
601	            String filtedConditionStr) {
602	        if (partCategoryCodesStr == null || partCategoryCodesStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
603	            return sum4Selected(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
604	        }
605	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = toPartCategoryAlgImpls(partCategoryCodesStr);
606	
607	        return buildSumExpr(
608	                partCategoryAlgImpls, cofAttrCode, PartVar.ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME, PartVar::getIsSelected,
609	                filtedConditionStr);
610	    }
611	
612	    /**
613	     * 对指定部件分类的部件求和（数量，支持多分类逗号分隔）
614	     * 
615	     * @param partCategoryCodesStr 部件分类代码，支持逗号分隔，如 "driveI0,driveI1"
616	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码
617	     * @param filtedConditionStr   过滤条件字符串
618	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
619	     */
620	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Quantity(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
621	            String filtedConditionStr) {
622	        if (Strings.isEmpty(partCategoryCodesStr)) {
623	            return sum4Quantity(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
624	        }
625	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = toPartCategoryAlgImpls(partCategoryCodesStr);
626	        return buildSumExpr(partCategoryAlgImpls, cofAttrCode, PartVar.QTY_SHORT_NAME, PartVar::getQty,
627	                filtedConditionStr);
628	    }
629	
630	    private List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> toPartCategoryAlgImpls(String partCategoryCodesStr) {
631	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = new ArrayList<>();
632	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.isEmpty()) {
633	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
634	        }
635	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.contains("*")) {
636	            String partCategoryCodePrefix = partCategoryCodesStr.replace("*", "");
637	            partCategoryAlgImpls.addAll(getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix));
638	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
639	        }
640	        String[] categoryCodes = partCategoryCodesStr.split(",");
641	        for (String categoryCode : categoryCodes) {
642	            partCategoryAlgImpls.add(getPartCategoryAlg(categoryCode));
643	        }
644	        return partCategoryAlgImpls;
645	    }
646	
647	    /**
648	     * 对选中的部件求和（带属性系数）
649	     *
650	     * @param cofAttrCode        属性代码，如果为null或空则使用默认值1
651	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
652	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
653	     */
654	
655	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String cofAttrCode,
656	            String filtedConditionStr) {
657	        return sum4Parts((PartCategoryAlgImpl) currentModuleAlg, cofAttrCode, PartVar::getIsSelected,
658	                PartVar.ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME, filtedConditionStr);
659	    }
660	
661	    /**
662	     * 对选中的部件求和（不带属性系数）
663	     *
664	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
665	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
666	     */
667	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String filtedConditionStr) {
668	        return sum4Selected(null, filtedConditionStr);
669	    }
670	
671	    /**
672	     * 对数量的部件求和（带属性系数）
673	     *
674	     * @param cofAttrCode        属性代码，如果为null或空则使用默认值1
675	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
676	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
677	     */
678	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Quantity(String cofAttrCode, String filtedConditionStr) {
679	        return sum4Parts((PartCategoryAlgImpl) currentModuleAlg,
680	                cofAttrCode, PartVar::getQty, PartVar.QTY_SHORT_NAME, filtedConditionStr);
681	    }
682	
683	    /**
684	     * 对数量的部件求和（不带属性系数）
685	     *
686	     * @param filtedConditionStr 过滤条件字符串
687	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
688	     */
689	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Quantity(String filtedConditionStr) {
690	        return sum4Quantity(null, filtedConditionStr);
691	    }
692	
693	    public void addControlParaEqual(String sumParaCode, String instSumParaCode) {
694	        // 动态表达式 addParaEqual("driveSumQuantity", "drive:SumQuantity");
695	        ParaVar sumParaVar = this.getParaVar(sumParaCode);
696	        if (sumParaVar == null) {
697	            // 打日志，抛异常
698	            log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumParaCode);
699	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " + sumParaCode);
700	        }
701	        // instSumParaCode,如："drive:SumQuantity", 解析出drive，SumQuantity
702	        String[] parts = instSumParaCode.split(":");
703	        if (parts.length != 2) {
704	            // 打日志，抛异常
705	            log.error("instSumParaCode is invalid: {}", instSumParaCode);
706	            throw new AlgLoaderException("instSumParaCode is invalid: " + instSumParaCode);
707	        }
708	
709	        String partCategoryCodePrefix = parts[0].trim();
710	        String sumQuantityCode = parts[1].trim();
711	        // expr=sumParaVar.value + sumParaVar.value + ...
712	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = this.getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix);
713	        if (partCategoryAlgImpls.isEmpty()) {
714	            // 打日志，抛异常
715	            log.warn("PartCategoryAlgImpl not found for code: {}", partCategoryCodePrefix);
716	            sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
717	        } else {
718	            Integer sumInputValue = 0;
719	            boolean hasInput = false;
720	            for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
721	                ParaVar instParaVar = partCategoryAlgImpl.getParaVar(sumQuantityCode);
722	                if (instParaVar == null || instParaVar.getInputValue() == null) {
723	                    // 打日志，抛异常
724	                    log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumQuantityCode);
725	                    // 暂时不抛异常 throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " +
726	                    // sumQuantityCode);
727	                    // issue:是不是总有一个控制参数是有输入的，方便执行（对结果进行校验）
728	                    continue;
729	                }
730	                // paraSumExpr.addTerm(instParaVar.getInputValue(), 1);
731	                sumInputValue += instParaVar.getInputValue();
732	                hasInput = true;
733	            }
734	            if (hasInput) {
735	                // 构建等式
736	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(true);
737	                sumParaVar.setInputValue(sumInputValue);
738	
739	            } else {
740	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
741	            }
742	
743	        }
744	
745	    }
746	
747	    /**
748	     * Apply decision strategies to part category variables.
749	     * Called after all variables are created and before rule initialization.
750	     */
751	    private void applyDecisionStrategies() {
752	        ModuleInput mi = getModuleInput();
753	        if (mi == null || mi.getPartCategoryInputs() == null) {
754	            return;
755	        }
756	        for (PartCategoryInputBase input : mi.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
757	            PartConstraintReq orgReq = input.getOrgReq();
758	            if (orgReq == null) {
759	                continue;
760	            }
761	            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = orgReq.getDecisionStrategies();
762	            if (strategies == null || strategies.isEmpty()) {
763	                continue;
764	            }
765	
766	            String partCategoryCode = input.getPartCategoryCode();
767	
768	            if (input instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
769	                MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) input;
770	                for (PartCategoryInput pcInput : multiInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
771	                    PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(pcInput.getPartCategoryCode());
772	                    if (pcAlg != null) {
773	                        applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
774	                    }
775	                }
776	            } else {
777	                PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
778	                if (pcAlg != null) {
779	                    applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
780	                }
781	            }
782	        }
783	    }
784	
785	    private void applyStrategies(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, List<StrategyConfig> strategies) {
786	        for (StrategyConfig config : strategies) {
787	            if (config.getStrategyType() == null || config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.UNSPECIFIED) {
788	                continue;
789	            }
790	            if (config.getSortAttributeCode() == null || config.getSortAttributeCode().isEmpty()) {
791	                log.warn("Strategy has no sortAttributeCode, skipping");
792	                continue;
793	            }
794	            applySingleStrategy(pcAlg, config);
795	        }
796	    }
797	
798	    private void applySingleStrategy(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, StrategyConfig config) {
799	        List<PartVar> partVars = pcAlg.getAllPartVars("");
800	        if (partVars.isEmpty()) {
801	            log.warn("No part vars found for category {}, skipping strategy", pcAlg.getCategoryCode());
802	            return;
803	        }
804	
805	        String sortAttr = config.getSortAttributeCode();
806	        boolean ascending = config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.ASCENDING;
807	
808	        // Sort part vars by the sort attribute
809	        partVars.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(pv -> getSortValue(pv, sortAttr)));
810	
811	        // Reverse for descending
812	        if (!ascending) {
813	            java.util.Collections.reverse(partVars);
814	        }
815	
816	        // Get isSelected BoolVars (which are IntVars) in sorted order
817	        IntVar[] vars = partVars.stream()
818	                .map(PartVar::getIsSelected)
819	                .toArray(IntVar[]::new);
820	
821	        // SELECT_MAX_VALUE: try selecting parts first, which means preferred parts
822	        // (sorted first) get selected in early solutions
823	        model.addDecisionStrategy(vars,
824	                DecisionStrategyProto.VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST,
825	                DecisionStrategyProto.DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE);
826	
827	        log.info("Applied decision strategy: {} on {} vars for category {}, sortAttr={}",
828	                config.getStrategyType(), vars.length, pcAlg.getCategoryCode(), sortAttr);
829	    }
830	
831	    /**
832	     * Get the integer sort value for a part variable by attribute code.
833	     * Supports basic attributes like "price" and dynamic attributes.
834	     */
835	    private int getSortValue(PartVar partVar, String attrCode) {
836	        if ("price".equals(attrCode) && partVar.getBase() instanceof Part) {
837	            Long price = ((Part) partVar.getBase()).getPrice();
838	            return price != null ? price.intValue() : 0;
839	        }
840	        return partVar.getAttr4Int(attrCode);
841	    }
842	}
843
```
</details></tool-use>

27	 */
28	@Slf4j
29	public class SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl extends ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements PartCategoryAlgImpl {
30	    /**
31	     * 实例ID
32	     */
33	    private int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
34	
35	    /**
36	     * 默认构造函数
37	     */
38	    public SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl() {
39	        super();
40	    }
41	
42	    @Override
43	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput,
44	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
45	        PartCategoryInput input = (PartCategoryInput) moduleInput;
46	        this.instId = input.getInstId();
47	        super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, moduleAlgFile);
48	    }
49	
50	    @Override
51	    public void initInput(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
52	        PartCategoryInput input = (PartCategoryInput) (this.moduleInput);
53	        newAttrParaVar(input.getSumAttrParas());
54	        super.initInput(moduleAlgFile);
55	        setPartCategoryInput(input);
56	    }
57	
58	    public void initRules(Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
59	        super.buildPriorityConstraint(getModule()); // 先构建本部件分类的优先类规则
60	        super.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
61	    }

65	     *

111	        ParaVar paraVar = super.getParaVar(AttrParaType.Sum.name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + attrCode);
112	        if (paraVar == null) {
113	            log.error("ParaVar not found for attrCode: {}", attrCode);

123	
124	    protected void sumFunConstraint(ModuleBaseAlgImpl moduleBaseAlgImplTmp,
125	            PartCategoryInputBase partConstraintTmp) {
126	        SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl singleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) moduleBaseAlgImplTmp;
127	        PartCategoryInput partConstraint = (PartCategoryInput) partConstraintTmp;
128	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr sumFunExpr = buildSumExpr(
129	                singleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl,
130	                partConstraint.getSumAttrCode(), "Q",
131	                PartVar::getQty, "");
132	        // 应用约束
133	        ComparisonOperator operator = ComparisonOperator.fromSymbol(partConstraint.getComparator());
134	        operator.applyConstraint(model, sumFunExpr, partConstraint.getLeftValue());
135	        log.info("Priority-Added sum constraint: {} for {}",
136	                sumFunExpr.getExprStr(),
137	                partConstraint.getOrgReq() != null ? partConstraint.getOrgReq().toString() : "null");
138	    }
139	}

 `./\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\SolutionUtils.java`

```text
1	package com.jmix.executor.impl;
2	
3	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
4	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleBaseInst;
5	import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
6	import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.OtherVar;
7	import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
8	
9	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
10	
11	import java.util.List;
12	import java.util.Map;
13	
14	/**
15	 * 解决方案工具类
16	 * 提供打印解决方案相关的静态方法
17	 * 
18	 * @since 2025-01-XX
19	 */
20	@Slf4j
21	public final class SolutionUtils {
22	
23	    /**
24	     * 私有构造函数，防止实例化
25	     */
26	    private SolutionUtils() {
27	        // 工具类，不允许实例化
28	    }
29	
30	    /**
31	     * 打印短格式解信息
32	     * 
33	     * @param module    模块
34	     * @param solutions 解列表
35	     * @param isSimple  是否使用简单格式
36	     * @param result    结果对象，用于获取消息
37	     */
38	    public static void printSolutions(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple,
39	            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result) {
40	        if (solutions == null || solutions.isEmpty()) {
41	            log.info("No solutions found");
42	            return;
43	        }
44	
45	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
46	        sb.append(System.lineSeparator()).append("******************************************")
47	                .append(System.lineSeparator());
48	        // 打印缩语解释
49	        sb.append("1.Abbreviation explanation:").append(System.lineSeparator());
50	
51	        // 1. shortCodes(P1:Size, P2:Color,PT1:part1)
52	        try {
53	            sb.append("1.1. ").append(module.getProgObjShortCodeMemo()).append(System.lineSeparator());
54	        } catch (Exception e) {
55	            log.warn("Failed to get ProgObjShortCodeMemo: {}", e.getMessage());
56	            sb.append("1.1. <failed to get>").append(System.lineSeparator());
57	        }
58	        // 2. Attrs(V:value, H:isHidden, Q:qty)
59	        sb.append("1.2. Attrs(V:value, H:isHidden, Q:qty,S:isSelected)").append(System.lineSeparator());
60	        // 3. Other Variable shortName
61	        sb.append("1.3. Other Variable shortName:").append(System.lineSeparator());
62	        try {
63	            printOthers(solutions, sb);
64	        } catch (Exception e) {
65	            log.warn("Failed to print Others: {}", e.getMessage());
66	        }
67	
68	        // 4. Priority Attribute shortName
69	        try {
70	            sb.append("1.4. Priority Attribute shortName:").append(solutions.get(0).getPriorityAttrShortCodeStr())
71	                    .append(System.lineSeparator());
72	        } catch (Exception e) {
73	            log.warn("Failed to get PriorityAttrShortCodeStr: {}", e.getMessage());
74	            sb.append("1.4. Priority Attribute shortName: <failed to get>").append(System.lineSeparator());
75	        }
76	
77	        sb.append("2.Solutions:").append(System.lineSeparator());
78	        // 打印解
79	        try {
80	            printSolutionList(solutions, isSimple, sb);
81	        } catch (Exception e) {
82	            log.warn("Failed to print solution list: {}", e.getMessage());
83	        }
84	        sb.append(System.lineSeparator()).append("******************************************")
85	                .append(System.lineSeparator());
86	        sb.append("3.Messages:").append(System.lineSeparator());
87	        if (result != null) {
88	            sb.append(result.getMessage()).append(System.lineSeparator());
89	        }
90	        log.info(sb.toString());
91	    }
92	
93	    /**
94	     * 打印解决方案列表
95	     *
96	     * @param solutions 解决方案列表
97	     * @param isSimple  是否使用简单格式
98	     */
99	    public static String toSolutionString(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
100	        return toSolutionString(solutions, true);
101	    }
102	
103	    /**
104	     * 打印解决方案列表
105	     *
106	     * @param solutions 解决方案列表
107	     */
108	    public static String toSolutionString(List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple) {
109	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
110	        sb.append("Solutions-Total:").append(solutions.size()).append(System.lineSeparator());
111	        sb.append("Solutions-Detail:").append(System.lineSeparator());
112	        printSolutionList(solutions, isSimple, sb);
113	        return sb.toString();
114	    }
115	
116	    private static void printSolutionList(List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple, StringBuilder sb) {
117	        int max = 20; // 最多打印20个
118	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
119	            if (i < max) {
120	                sb.append(" S_").append(i + 1).append(": ").append(solutions.get(i).toShortString(isSimple))
121	                        .append(System.lineSeparator());
122	            }
123	            if (i == max) {
124	                sb.append(" ... remaining solutions: ").append(solutions.size() - max).append(System.lineSeparator());
125	                break;
126	            }
127	        }
128	    }
129	
130	    /**
131	     * 打印其他变量的短名称信息
132	     *
133	     * @param solutions 解决方案列表
134	     * @param sb        字符串构建器
135	     */
136	    private static void printOthers(List<ModuleInst> solutions, StringBuilder sb) {
137	        if (!solutions.isEmpty()) {
138	            ModuleInst firstSolution = solutions.get(0);
139	            Object otherVarsMemo = firstSolution.getExtAttrs().get(ModuleBaseInst.OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO_KEY);
140	            if (otherVarsMemo instanceof Map) {
141	                @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
142	                Map<String, OtherVar> otherVarMap = (Map<String, OtherVar>) otherVarsMemo;
143	                for (Map.Entry<String, OtherVar> entry : otherVarMap.entrySet()) {
144	                    OtherVar otherVar = entry.getValue();
145	                    sb.append(" ").append(otherVar.getShortCode()).append(":").append(otherVar.getCode())
146	                            .append(System.lineSeparator());
147	                }
148	            }
149	        }
150	    }
151	}
152
```

1	package com.jmix.executor.impl.util;
2	
3	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
4	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr.IDynamicAttributable;
5	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr.InstanceDynAttrValueItem;
6	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.Extensible;
7	import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.IExtensible;
8	
9	import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
10	import lombok.Data;
11	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
12	
13	import org.springframework.util.ReflectionUtils;
14	
15	import java.lang.reflect.Field;
16	import java.util.ArrayList;
17	import java.util.List;
18	import java.util.Map;
19	import java.util.Optional;
20	import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
21	import java.util.regex.Matcher;
22	import java.util.regex.Pattern;
23	
24	/**
25	 * 过滤表达式执行器
26	 * 用于执行过滤表达式，支持对象属性过滤
27	 * 
28	 * @since 2025-09-22
29	 */
30	@Slf4j
31	public final class FilterExpressionExecutor {
32	
33	    // 操作符常量
34	    public static final String OP_EQUALS = "=";
35	    public static final String OP_EQUALS_DOUBLE = "==";
36	    public static final String OP_NOT_EQUALS = "!=";
37	    public static final String OP_GREATER_THAN = ">";
38	    public static final String OP_LESS_THAN = "<";
39	    public static final String OP_GREATER_EQUALS = ">=";
40	    public static final String OP_LESS_EQUALS = "<=";
41	    public static final String OP_LIKE = "like";
42	    public static final String OP_NOT_LIKE = "not like";
43	
44	    private static final Pattern FILTER_PATTERN = Pattern
45	            .compile("(\\w+)\\s*([=!<>]+|not\\s+like|like)\\s*\"?([^\"]*)\"?");
46	    private static final Pattern MULTI_CONDITION_PATTERN = Pattern.compile("\\s+and\\s+", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE);
47	
48	    // Class field cache to improve performance
49	    private static final Map<Class<?>, Map<String, java.lang.reflect.Field>> FIELD_CACHE = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
50	
51	    /**
52	     * 私有构造器，防止工具类被实例化
53	     */
54	    private FilterExpressionExecutor() {
55	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Utility class cannot be instantiated");
56	    }
57	
58	    /**
59	     * Filter condition representation
60	     */
61	    @Data
62	    @AllArgsConstructor
63	    public static class FilterCondition {
64	
65	        private final String fieldName;
66	
67	        private final String operator;
68	
69	        private final String value;
70	
71	        /**
72	         * 复合条件列表（用于 AND 连接多个条件）
73	         */
74	        private final List<FilterCondition> subConditions;
75	
76	        /**
77	         * 判断是否为复合条件（AND 条件）
78	         */
79	        public boolean isCompound() {
80	            return subConditions != null && !subConditions.isEmpty();
81	        }
82	
83	        /**
84	         * 创建简单条件
85	         */
86	        public static FilterCondition simple(String fieldName, String operator, String value) {
87	            return new FilterCondition(fieldName, operator, value, null);
88	        }
89	
90	        /**
91	         * 创建复合条件（AND）
92	         */
93	        public static FilterCondition and(List<FilterCondition> conditions) {
94	            return new FilterCondition(null, null, null, conditions);
95	        }
96	    }
97	
98	    /**
99	     * 根据过滤表达式过滤对象列表，例如:
100	     * partCode speed capacity
101	     * part1 5400 1T
102	     * part2 7200 2T
103	     * part3 9000 4T
104	     * filterExpr = speed 5400,则返回结果 part1
105	     * 
106	     * @param objects    要过滤的对象列表
107	     * @param filterExpr 过滤表达式
108	     * @param <T>        对象类型，必须继承自Extensible
109	     * @return 过滤后的对象列表
110	     */
111	    public static <T extends IExtensible> List<T> doSelect(List<T> objects, String filterExpr) {
112	        log.info("Starting filter expression execution, object count: {}, filter expression: {}",
113	                objects != null ? objects.size() : 0, filterExpr);
114	
115	        if (objects == null || objects.isEmpty() || filterExpr == null || filterExpr.trim().isEmpty()) {
116	            log.warn("Invalid input parameters, returning original object list");
117	            return objects;
118	        }
119	        Optional<FilterCondition> filterCondition = parseFilterExpression(filterExpr);
120	        return doSelect(objects, filterCondition.get());
121	    }
122	
123	    /**
124	     * 根据过滤表达式过滤对象列表
125	     * 
126	     * @param objects         要过滤的对象列表
127	     * @param filterCondition 过滤表达式
128	     * @param <T>             对象类型，必须继承自Extensible
129	     * @return 过滤后的对象列表
130	     */
131	    public static <T extends IExtensible> List<T> doSelect(List<T> objects, FilterCondition filterCondition) {
132	        if (filterCondition == null) {
133	            log.warn("Filter condition is null, returning original object list");
134	            return objects;
135	        }
136	
137	        FilterCondition condition = filterCondition;
138	
139	        log.info("Filter expression parsed successfully - field: {}, operator: {}, value: {}",
140	                condition.getFieldName(), condition.getOperator(), condition.getValue());
141	
142	        List<T> filterObjects = new ArrayList<>();
143	
144	        for (T object : objects) {
145	            if (matchesFilter(object, condition)) {
146	                filterObjects.add(object);
147	            }
148	        }
149	
150	        log.info("Filtering completed, found {} objects", filterObjects.size());
151	        return filterObjects;
152	    }
153	
154	    /**
155	     * 将扣除条件转换为过滤条件（取反操作符）
156	     * 例如：deductCondition.operator = "=" 转换为 filterCondition.operator = "!="
157	     * 
158	     * @param deductCondition 扣除条件
159	     * @return 取反后的过滤条件
160	     */
161	    private static FilterCondition negateFilterCondition(FilterCondition deductCondition) {
162	        if (deductCondition == null) {
163	            return null;
164	        }
165	
166	        String negatedOperator;
167	        String operator = deductCondition.getOperator();
168	
169	        switch (operator) {
170	            case OP_EQUALS:
171	            case OP_EQUALS_DOUBLE:
172	                negatedOperator = OP_NOT_EQUALS;
173	                break;
174	            case OP_NOT_EQUALS:
175	                negatedOperator = OP_EQUALS;
176	                break;
177	            case OP_GREATER_THAN:
178	                negatedOperator = OP_LESS_EQUALS;
179	                break;
180	            case OP_LESS_THAN:
181	                negatedOperator = OP_GREATER_EQUALS;
182	                break;
183	            case OP_GREATER_EQUALS:
184	                negatedOperator = OP_LESS_THAN;
185	                break;
186	            case OP_LESS_EQUALS:
187	                negatedOperator = OP_GREATER_THAN;
188	                break;
189	            case OP_LIKE:
190	                negatedOperator = OP_NOT_LIKE;
191	                break;
192	            case OP_NOT_LIKE:
193	                negatedOperator = OP_LIKE;
194	                break;
195	            default:
196	                log.warn("Unsupported operator for negation: {}, returning original condition", operator);
197	                negatedOperator = operator;
198	                break;
199	        }
200	
201	        return FilterCondition.simple(deductCondition.getFieldName(), negatedOperator, deductCondition.getValue());
202	    }
203	
204	    /**
205	     * 根据扣除表达式获得扣除后的对象列表，例如:
206	     * partCode speed capacity
207	     * part1 5400 1T
208	     * part2 7200 2T
209	     * part3 9000 4T
210	     * deductExpr = speed 5400,则返回结果 part2，part3
211	     * 
212	     * @param objects    要扣除对象列表-全
213	     * @param deductExpr 扣除表达式
214	     * @param <T>        对象类型，必须继承自Extensible
215	     * @return 扣除后的对象列表
216	     */
217	    public static <T extends Extensible> List<T> doDeduct(List<T> objects, String deductExpr) {
218	        log.info("Starting deduct expression execution, object count: {}, deduct expression: {}",
219	                objects != null ? objects.size() : 0, deductExpr);
220	
221	        if (objects == null || objects.isEmpty() || deductExpr == null || deductExpr.trim().isEmpty()) {
222	            log.warn("Invalid input parameters, returning original object list");
223	            return objects;
224	        }
225	
226	        Optional<FilterCondition> deductCondition = parseFilterExpression(deductExpr);
227	        if (!deductCondition.isPresent()) {
228	            log.warn("Failed to parse deduct expression: {}, returning original object list", deductExpr);
229	            return objects;
230	        }
231	
232	        FilterCondition filterCondition = negateFilterCondition(deductCondition.get());
233	        return doSelect(objects, filterCondition);
234	    }
235	
236	    /**
237	     * Parse filter expression once and return FilterCondition
238	     * Supports single condition and multiple AND conditions
239	     * 
240	     * <p>
241	     * Supported formats:
242	     * <ul>
243	     * <li>Single condition: "field = value"</li>
244	     * <li>Multiple AND conditions: "field1 = value1 and field2 = value2"</li>
245	     * </ul>
246	     * 
247	     * @param filterExpr 过滤表达式字符串
248	     * @return 解析后的过滤条件，如果解析失败则返回空
249	     */
250	    public static Optional<FilterCondition> parseFilterExpression(String filterExpr) {
251	        try {
252	            if (filterExpr == null || filterExpr.trim().isEmpty()) {
253	                return Optional.empty();
254	            }
255	
256	            // Split multiple conditions by AND
257	            String[] conditionParts = MULTI_CONDITION_PATTERN.split(filterExpr);
258	
259	            if (conditionParts.length == 1) {
260	                // Single condition, parse directly
261	                return parseSingleCondition(filterExpr.trim());
262	            } else {
263	                // Multiple AND conditions, parse each and combine
264	                List<FilterCondition> conditions = new ArrayList<>();
265	                for (String part : conditionParts) {
266	                    Optional<FilterCondition> parsed = parseSingleCondition(part.trim());
267	                    if (parsed.isPresent()) {
268	                        conditions.add(parsed.get());
269	                    } else {
270	                        log.warn("Failed to parse filter condition part: {}", part);
271	                        return Optional.empty();
272	                    }
273	                }
274	
275	                if (conditions.size() == 1) {
276	                    return Optional.of(conditions.get(0));
277	                }
278	                return Optional.of(FilterCondition.and(conditions));
279	            }
280	        } catch (Exception e) {
281	            log.error("Exception occurred while parsing filter expression: {}", filterExpr, e);
282	            return Optional.empty();
283	        }
284	    }
285	
286	    /**
287	     * Parse single filter condition
288	     * 
289	     * @param conditionStr 条件字符串
290	     * @return 解析后的过滤条件
291	     */
292	    private static Optional<FilterCondition> parseSingleCondition(String conditionStr) {
293	        Matcher matcher = FILTER_PATTERN.matcher(conditionStr);
294	        if (matcher.find()) {
295	            String fieldName = matcher.group(1);
296	            String operator = matcher.group(2).trim();
297	            String value = matcher.group(3);
298	
299	            // Normalize "not like" operator
300	            if (operator.equalsIgnoreCase("not like")) {
301	                operator = OP_NOT_LIKE;
302	            }
303	
304	            return Optional.of(FilterCondition.simple(fieldName, operator, value));
305	        } else {
306	            log.warn("Invalid filter expression format: {}", conditionStr);
307	            return Optional.empty();
308	        }
309	    }
310	
311	    /**
312	     * Check if object matches filter condition
313	     * Supports both simple and compound (AND) conditions
314	     * 
315	     * @param object    要检查的对象
316	     * @param condition 过滤条件
317	     * @return 如果对象匹配条件则返回true，否则返回false
318	     */
319	    private static <T extends IExtensible> boolean matchesFilter(T object, FilterCondition condition) {
320	        try {
321	            // Handle compound conditions (AND)
322	            if (condition.isCompound()) {
323	                List<FilterCondition> subConditions = condition.getSubConditions();
324	                if (subConditions == null || subConditions.isEmpty()) {
325	                    return true;
326	                }
327	                // AND logic: all conditions must match
328	                for (FilterCondition subCondition : subConditions) {
329	                    if (!matchesFilter(object, subCondition)) {
330	                        return false;
331	                    }
332	                }
333	                return true;
334	            }
335	
336	            // Handle simple condition
337	            return evaluateCondition(object, condition.getFieldName(), condition.getOperator(), condition.getValue());
338	        } catch (Exception e) {
339	            log.error("Exception occurred while evaluating filter condition for object: {}",
340	                    object.getClass().getSimpleName(), e);
341	            return false;
342	        }
343	    }
344	
345	    /**
346	     * Evaluate condition
347	     * 
348	     * @param object    要检查的对象
349	     * @param fieldName 字段名
350	     * @param operator  操作符
351	     * @param value     比较值
352	     * @return 如果条件满足则返回true，否则返回false
353	     */
354	    private static <T extends IExtensible> boolean evaluateCondition(T object, String fieldName, String operator,
355	            String value) {
356	        try {
357	            // Try to get field value through reflection
358	            Optional<Object> fieldValueOpt = getFieldValue(object, fieldName);
359	
360	            if (!fieldValueOpt.isPresent()) {
361	                log.info("Field {} value is null, condition not matched", fieldName);
362	                return false;
363	            }
364	
365	            Object fieldValue = fieldValueOpt.get();
366	            String fieldValueStr = fieldValue.toString();
367	            log.info("Evaluating condition - field: {}, operator: {}, field value: {}, compare value: {}",
368	                    fieldName, operator, fieldValueStr, value);
369	
370	            boolean result = false;
371	            switch (operator) {
372	                case OP_EQUALS:
373	                case OP_EQUALS_DOUBLE:
374	                    result = fieldValueStr.equals(value);
375	                    break;
376	                case OP_NOT_EQUALS:
377	                    result = !fieldValueStr.equals(value);
378	                    break;
379	                case OP_GREATER_THAN:
380	                    result = compareValues(fieldValueStr, value) > 0;
381	                    break;
382	                case OP_LESS_THAN:
383	                    result = compareValues(fieldValueStr, value) < 0;
384	                    break;
385	                case OP_GREATER_EQUALS:
386	                    result = compareValues(fieldValueStr, value) >= 0;
387	                    break;
388	                case OP_LESS_EQUALS:
389	                    result = compareValues(fieldValueStr, value) <= 0;
390	                    break;
391	                case OP_LIKE:
392	                    result = matchesLikePattern(fieldValueStr, value);
393	                    break;
394	                case OP_NOT_LIKE:
395	                    result = !matchesLikePattern(fieldValueStr, value);
396	                    break;
397	                default:
398	                    log.warn("Unsupported operator: {}", operator);
399	                    return false;
400	            }
401	
402	            log.info("Condition evaluation result: {} {} {} = {}", fieldValueStr, operator, value, result);
403	            return result;
404	        } catch (Exception e) {
405	            log.error("Exception occurred while evaluating condition - field: {}, operator: {}, value: {}", fieldName,
406	                    operator, value, e);
407	            return false;
408	        }
409	    }
410	
411	    /**
412	     * Get field value with caching and Spring ReflectionUtils
413	     * 
414	     * @param object    要获取字段值的对象
415	     * @param fieldName 字段名
416	     * @return 字段值，如果获取失败则返回空
417	     */
418	    private static Optional<Object> getFieldValue(Object object, String fieldName) {
419	        try {
420	            // Try to get extended attributes first
421	            if (object instanceof IExtensible) {
422	                IExtensible extensible = (IExtensible) object;
423	                String extValue = extensible.getExtAttr(fieldName);
424	                if (extValue != null) {
425	                    log.info("Getting field value from extended attributes - field: {}, value: {}", fieldName,
426	                            extValue);
427	                    return Optional.of(extValue);
428	                }
429	            }
430	            // Try to get dyn attributes first
431	            if (object instanceof IDynamicAttributable) {
432	                IDynamicAttributable part = (IDynamicAttributable) object;
433	                String attValue = part.getAttr(fieldName);
434	                if (attValue != null) {
435	                    log.info("Getting field value from dyn attributes - field: {}, value: {}", fieldName,
436	                            attValue);
437	                    return Optional.of(attValue);
438	                }
439	            }
440	            // Try to get dyn attributes first
441	            if (object instanceof InstanceDynAttrValueItem) {
442	                InstanceDynAttrValueItem intAttrValue = (InstanceDynAttrValueItem) object;
443	                String attValue = intAttrValue.getInstAttr(fieldName);
444	                if (attValue != null) {
445	                    log.info("Getting field value from InstanceDynAttrValueItem attributes - field: {}, value: {}",
446	                            fieldName, attValue);
447	                    return Optional.of(attValue);
448	                }
449	            }
450	
451	            // Get field from cache or find it using Spring ReflectionUtils
452	            Field field = getFieldFromCache(object.getClass(), fieldName);
453	            if (field != null) {
454	                field.setAccessible(true);
455	                Object value = field.get(object);
456	                log.info("Getting field value through reflection - field: {}, value: {}, class: {}",
457	                        fieldName, value, field.getDeclaringClass().getSimpleName());
458	                return Optional.ofNullable(value);
459	            }
460	            // Try to get extended attributes first
461	            if (object instanceof Part) {
462	                Part part = (Part) object;
463	                String value = part.getAttr(fieldName);
464	                if (value != null) {
465	                    log.info("Getting field value from part attributes - field: {}, value: {}", fieldName, value);
466	                    return Optional.of(value);
467	                }
468	            }
469	            log.info("Field {} not found in class {} or its parent classes", fieldName,
470	                    object.getClass().getSimpleName());
471	            return Optional.empty();
472	        } catch (Exception e) {
473	            log.info("Failed to get field value - field: {}, object type: {}", fieldName,
474	                    object.getClass().getSimpleName(), e);
475	            // Return empty if getting fails
476	            return Optional.empty();
477	        }
478	    }
479	
480	    /**
481	     * Get field from cache or find it using Spring ReflectionUtils
482	     * 
483	     * @param clazz     要查找字段的类
484	     * @param fieldName 字段名
485	     * @return 找到的字段，如果未找到则返回null
486	     */
487	    private static java.lang.reflect.Field getFieldFromCache(Class<?> clazz, String fieldName) {
488	        // Get class field map from cache
489	        Map<String, java.lang.reflect.Field> classFields = FIELD_CACHE.computeIfAbsent(clazz,
490	                k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>());
491	
492	        // Check if field is already cached
493	        java.lang.reflect.Field cachedField = classFields.get(fieldName);
494	        if (cachedField != null) {
495	            return cachedField;
496	        }
497	
498	        // Find field using Spring ReflectionUtils (searches through entire class
499	        // hierarchy)
500	        java.lang.reflect.Field field = ReflectionUtils.findField(clazz, fieldName);
501	        if (field != null) {
502	            // Cache the found field
503	            classFields.put(fieldName, field);
504	            log.info("Field {} found and cached for class {}", fieldName, clazz.getSimpleName());
505	        }
506	
507	        return field;
508	    }
509	
510	    /**
511	     * Check if value matches like pattern
512	     *
513	     * @param fieldValue 字段值
514	     * @param pattern    like模式字符串，支持%和_通配符
515	     * @return 如果匹配则返回true，否则返回false
516	     */
517	    private static boolean matchesLikePattern(String fieldValue, String pattern) {
518	        try {
519	            // Convert SQL like pattern to regex pattern
520	            String regex = convertLikePatternToRegex(pattern);
521	            boolean result = fieldValue.matches(regex);
522	            log.info("Like pattern matching: '{}' like '{}' -> regex: '{}' -> result: {}",
523	                    fieldValue, pattern, regex, result);
524	            return result;
525	        } catch (Exception e) {
526	            log.error("Exception occurred while matching like pattern - value: {}, pattern: {}", fieldValue, pattern,
527	                    e);
528	            return false;
529	        }
530	    }
531	
532	    /**
533	     * Convert SQL like pattern to regex pattern
534	     *
535	     * @param likePattern SQL like模式字符串
536	     * @return 转换后的正则表达式
537	     */
538	    private static String convertLikePatternToRegex(String likePattern) {
539	        // Escape special regex characters except % and _
540	        String escaped = likePattern
541	                .replace("\\", "\\\\")
542	                .replace(".", "\\.")
543	                .replace("^", "\\^")
544	                .replace("$", "\\$")
545	                .replace("*", "\\*")
546	                .replace("+", "\\+")
547	                .replace("?", "\\?")
548	                .replace("|", "\\|")
549	                .replace("{", "\\{")
550	                .replace("}", "\\}")
551	                .replace("[", "\\[")
552	                .replace("]", "\\]")
553	                .replace("(", "\\(")
554	                .replace(")", "\\)");
555	
556	        // Convert SQL wildcards to regex
557	        String regex = escaped
558	                .replace("%", ".*") // % matches any sequence of characters
559	                .replace("_", "."); // _ matches any single character
560	
561	        // Add anchors to match entire string
562	        return "^" + regex + "$";
563	    }
564	
565	    /**
566	     * Compare values
567	     *
568	     * @param value1 第一个值
569	     * @param value2 第二个值
570	     * @return 比较结果：负数表示value1小于value2，0表示相等，正数表示value1大于value2
571	     */
572	    private static int compareValues(String value1, String value2) {
573	        try {
574	            // Try to convert to numbers for comparison
575	            double num1 = Double.parseDouble(value1);
576	            double num2 = Double.parseDouble(value2);
577	            int result = Double.compare(num1, num2);
578	            log.info("Numeric comparison: {} vs {} = {}", value1, value2, result);
579	            return result;
580	        } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
581	            // If cannot convert to numbers, compare as strings
582	            int result = value1.compareTo(value2);
583	            log.info("String comparison: {} vs {} = {}", value1, value2, result);
584	            return result;
585	        }
586	    }
587	}
```
</details></tool-use>

1	package com.jmix.executor.model;
2	
3	import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
4	import lombok.Data;
5	import lombok.NoArgsConstructor;
6	
7	import java.util.Map;
8	
9	/**
10	 * 结果类
11	 * 用于封装操作结果，包含状态码、数据和消息
12	 * 
13	 * @since 2025-09-22
14	 */
15	@Data
16	@AllArgsConstructor
17	@NoArgsConstructor
18	public class Result<T> {
19	    /**
20	     * 操作成功状态码
21	     */
22	    public static final int SUCCESS = 0;
23	
24	    /**
25	     * 操作失败状态码
26	     */
27	    public static final int FAILED = 1;
28	
29	    /**
30	     * 无解状态码
31	     */
32	    public static final int NO_SOLUTION = 2;
33	
34	    /**
35	     * 状态码
36	     */
37	    private int code = SUCCESS;
38	
39	    /**
40	     * 返回数据
41	     */
42	    private T data;
43	
44	    /**
45	     * 消息
46	     */
47	    private String message;
48	
49	    /**
50	     * 扩展属性
51	     */
52	    private Map<String, Object> extAttrs;
53	
54	    /**
55	     * 创建成功结果
56	     * 
57	     * @param data 成功时返回的数据
58	     * @param <X>  数据类型
59	     * @return 成功结果对象
60	     */
61	    public static <X> Result<X> success(X data) {
62	        Result<X> r = new Result<>();
63	        r.setCode(SUCCESS);
64	        r.setData(data);
65	        return r;
66	    }
67	
68	    /**
69	     * 创建失败结果
70	     * 
71	     * @param msg 失败消息
72	     * @param <X> 数据类型
73	     * @return 失败结果对象
74	     */
75	    public static <X> Result<X> failed(String msg) {
76	        Result<X> r = new Result<>();
77	        r.setCode(FAILED);
78	        r.setMessage(msg);
79	        return r;
80	    }
81	
82	    /**
83	     * 创建无解结果
84	     * 
85	     * @param <X> 数据类型
86	     * @return 无解结果对象
87	     */
88	    public static <X> Result<X> noSolution() {
89	        return noSolution("");
90	    }
91	
92	    /**
93	     * 创建无解结果,待描述信息的
94	     * 
95	     * @param msg 无解消息
96	     * @param <X> 数据类型
97	     * @return 无解结果对象
98	     */
99	    public static <X> Result<X> noSolution(String msg) {
100	        Result<X> r = new Result<>();
101	        r.setCode(NO_SOLUTION);
102	        r.setMessage(msg);
103	        return r;
104	    }
105	}
106

1	package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;
2	
3	import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
4	
5	import lombok.Data;
6	
7	import java.util.ArrayList;
8	import java.util.Collections;
9	import java.util.HashMap;
10	import java.util.List;
11	import java.util.Map;
12	
13	/**
14	 * 模块基础实例类
15	 * ModuleInst和PartCategoryInst的公共基类
16	 * 提供实例的公共属性和方法
17	 *
18	 * @since 2025-01-XX
19	 */
20	@Data
21	public class ModuleBaseInst {
22	
23	    /**
24	     * 默认实例ID常量
25	     */
26	    public static final int DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID = 0;
27	
28	    /**
29	     * 无序的实例ID常量
30	     */
31	    public static final int INVALID_INSTANCE_ID = -1;
32	
33	    /**
34	     * 其他变量值键名
35	     * 用于存储其他变量的值映射，格式：v1:1,v2:2,v3:3,v4:1
36	     */
37	    public static final String OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE_KEY = "OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE";
38	
39	    /**
40	     * 其他变量备注键名
41	     * 用于存储其他变量的备注信息，格式：v1:a1OrA3, v2:b1OrB2OrB3
42	     */
43	    public static final String OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO_KEY = "OTHER_VARIABLES_MEMO";
44	
45	    /**
46	     * 实例ID，默认为0，多个实例从0开始，如：0，1,2，....
47	     */
48	    private int instanceId = DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
49	
50	    /**
51	     * 编码
52	     */
53	    private String code;
54	
55	    /**
56	     * 参数实例列表
57	     */
58	    private List<ParaInst> paras = new ArrayList<>();
59	
60	    /**
61	     * 部件实例列表（仅当前层的部件）
62	     */
63	    private List<PartInst> parts = new ArrayList<>();
64	
65	    /**
66	     * 扩展属性
67	     */
68	    private Map<String, Object> extAttrs = new HashMap<>();
69	
70	    /**
71	     * 短编码,仅用于调试
72	     */
73	    @JsonIgnore
74	    private String shortCode;
75	
76	    /**
77	     * 根据部件代码查询部件实例
78	     *
79	     * @param partCode 部件代码
80	     * @return 部件实例，如果不存在则返回null
81	     */
82	    public PartInst queryPart(String partCode) {
83	        if (partCode == null || partCode.isEmpty()) {
84	            return null;
85	        }
86	        for (PartInst partInst : parts) {
87	            if (partCode.equals(partInst.getCode())) {
88	                return partInst;
89	            }
90	        }
91	        return null;
92	    }
93	
94	    /**
95	     * 添加参数实例
96	     *
97	     * @param paraInst 参数实例
98	     */
99	    public void addParaInst(ParaInst paraInst) {
100	        paras.add(paraInst);
101	    }
102	
103	    /**
104	     * 添加部件实例
105	     *
106	     * @param partInst 部件实例
107	     */
108	    public void addPartInst(PartInst partInst) {
109	        parts.add(partInst);
110	    }
111	
112	    /**
113	     * 生成短字符串表示
114	     *
115	     * @param isSimple 是否使用简单格式
116	     * @return 短字符串
117	     */
118	    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple, int instId) {
119	        String prefix = instId > 0 ? "I" + instId + "_" : "";
120	        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
121	        // 对paras按code升序排序
122	        Collections.sort(paras, (a, b) -> a.getCode().compareTo(b.getCode()));
123	        // 对parts按code升序排序
124	        Collections.sort(parts, (a, b) -> a.getCode().compareTo(b.getCode()));
125	        // 添加参数信息
126	        for (ParaInst para : paras) {
127	            if (sb.length() > 0) {
128	                sb.append(",");
129	            }
130	            sb.append(prefix).append(para.toShortString());
131	        }
132	
133	        // 添加部件信息
134	        for (PartInst part : parts) {
135	            if (sb.length() > 0) {
136	                sb.append(",");
137	            }
138	            sb.append(prefix).append(part.toShortString(isSimple));
139	        }
140	        // 添加其他变量信息
141	        appendOtherVariablesInfo(sb);
142	
143	        // 如果有shortCode，则使用shortCode作为前缀
144	        if (shortCode != null) {
145	            return shortCode + "(" + sb.toString() + ")";
146	        }
147	
148	        return sb.toString();
149	    }
150	
151	    /**
152	     * 添加其他变量信息到字符串构建器
153	     *
154	     * @param sb 字符串构建器
155	     */
156	    protected void appendOtherVariablesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
157	        Object otherVarsValue = extAttrs.get(OTHER_VARIABLES_VALUE_KEY);
158	        if (!(otherVarsValue instanceof Map)) {
159	            return;
160	        }
161	        @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
162	        Map<String, Long> otherVarKeyMap = (Map<String, Long>) otherVarsValue;
163	        if (otherVarKeyMap.isEmpty()) {
164	            return;
165	        }
166	        if (sb.length() > 0) {
167	            sb.append(",");
168	        }
169	        sb.append("Other(");
170	        boolean first = true;
171	        for (Map.Entry<String, Long> entry : otherVarKeyMap.entrySet()) {
172	            if (!first) {
173	                sb.append(",");
174	            }
175	            sb.append(entry.getKey()).append(":").append(entry.getValue());
176	            first = false;
177	        }
178	        sb.append(")");
179	    }
180	}
181
```
</details></tool-use>

I now have a complete picture. Here is the full PartCategory filtering flow analysis.

---

## PartCategory Filtering Flow in JMix Config Engine

### 1. Two Entry Points That Call `filterClone()`

**Entry A: `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone()`** (when called from `processProduct()`)

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java`
- **Lines 172-241**

Inside the loop (line 196-198), when the filter produces **no matching parts**, the code throws an `AlgExecutorException`:

```java
if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
}
```

The message is: `"Priority-filtered aparts: {} by {}"` -- where `{}` is an empty short string. The exception propagates up to `processProduct()`'s `catch (Exception e)` block (line 166-169) and returns `Result.failed(...)`.

**Entry B: `PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.doProcess()`** (single-category path)

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.java`
- **Lines 39-91**

At line 61-63, when the filter produces no matching parts, it returns a **`Result.noSolution(msg)`** instead of throwing:

```java
if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    return Result.noSolution(msg);
}
```

The key difference: `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl` throws an exception (wrapping to `Result.failed`), while `PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl` returns `Result.noSolution()` (code=2).

---

### 2. `PartCategory.filterClone()` --> `querySubAtomicParts()` --> `FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect()`

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/bmodel/PartCategory.java`

**`filterClone()` (lines 109-131):**

```java
public PartCategory filterClone(PartConstraintReq constraintReq) {
    return filterClone(this, constraintReq, false);
}
```

The private recursive method (lines 113-131) clones the PartCategory, then calls `querySubAtomicParts()` to filter leaf (atomic) parts, then recurses into sub-categories.

**`querySubAtomicParts()` (lines 133-185):**

Two code paths:
- **Non-instance attributes** (line 142-145): calls `FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, attrWhereCondition)`.
- **Instance attributes** (line 147-182): iterates each part's `InstanceDynAttrValueItem` list, filters by `doSelect(instValues, attrWhereCondition)`. If the filtered list is empty, skips that part. Otherwise clones the part with aggregated instance values.

**`FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect()`:**

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/util/FilterExpressionExecutor.java`
- **Lines 111-121 (public entry), 131-152 (core logic)**

```java
public static <T extends IExtensible> List<T> doSelect(List<T> objects, String filterExpr) {
    if (objects == null || objects.isEmpty() || filterExpr == null || filterExpr.trim().isEmpty()) {
        return objects;
    }
    Optional<FilterCondition> filterCondition = parseFilterExpression(filterExpr);
    return doSelect(objects, filterCondition.get());
}
```

When **no parts match**, the core loop (lines 142-152) builds `filterObjects` which ends up as an **empty `ArrayList`**. This empty list is returned to `querySubAtomicParts()`, which adds it to `resultPartCategory` via `addAtomicPartsWithoutStructure()` (an effectively no-op for an empty list).

Then `getAllAtomicPartShortString()` on the filtered PartCategory returns an empty representation, triggering the error guards described in section 1.

---

### 3. `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` When PartCategory Has Empty Atomic Parts

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/algmodel/ModuleAlgImpl.java`
- **Lines 205-243**

When `initData()` runs (line 237 for `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl`), it calls `super.initData()` on the base class.

**`ModuleBaseAlgImpl.initData()`:**

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/algmodel/ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java`
- **Lines 657-669**

```java
protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
    this.model = model;
    this.module = module;
    this.moduleInput = moduleInput;
    this.compatibleConstraintAlg = new CompatibleConstraintAlg(model);
    initModelAfter(model);
    initAll(moduleAlgFile);  // <-- this is where parts/paras become variables
}
```

**`initAll()` (lines 328-347):**

```java
for (Part part : module.getAtomicParts()) {
    PartVar partVar = initPartVar(part);
    partMap.put(part.getCode(), partVar);
}
```

When the `filteredCategory` has **no atomic parts**, `getAtomicParts()` returns an empty list, so the loop body never executes. `partMap` remains empty. The algorithm proceeds with zero part variables. Later, during `initInput()` (line 159-184 of ModuleAlgImpl), when it tries to add `partEquality` or sum constraints, operations on an empty `partMap` will either be silent no-ops or may produce warnings (e.g., `sumFunConstraint` and `buildSumExpr` may log warnings or produce empty expressions). The CP-SAT solver would then see an under-constrained model which would either be trivially satisfiable or produce an `INFEASIBLE` result depending on other constraints.

---

### 4. `toPartCategoryInput()` and `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl.initData()` -- Error With Empty FilteredCategory

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl.java`
- **Lines 259-266**

```java
public static PartCategoryInput toPartCategoryInput(PartCategory filteredCategory,
        PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq) {
    PartCategoryInput fromReq = new PartCategoryInput();
    setPartCategoryInputBase(fromReq, partConstraintReq);
    fromReq.setFilteredCategory(filteredCategory);  // stores the empty category directly
    return fromReq;
}
```

`toPartCategoryInput()` itself does NOT validate if `filteredCategory` is empty. It simply wraps it. The problem manifests downstream:

**Flow into `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl.initData()`:**

1. `PartCategoryInput` (with empty `filteredCategory`) is passed into `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` (line 237).
2. `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl.initData()` (line 43-48) calls `super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, moduleAlgFile)` where `module` is the `PartCategory` (the empty filtered one).
3. `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.initData()` -> `initAll()` iterates `module.getAtomicParts()` which is empty -- so zero `PartVar` objects are created.
4. Later, `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl.initInput()` (line 51-56) calls `setPartCategoryInput(input)`.
5. `setPartCategoryInput()` (ModuleBaseAlgImpl, lines 143-152) calls `setPartCategoryInputVariales()` which looks for constraint parameters. If the `PartConstraintReq` has `attrCode`, `comparator`, `leftValue` set, it will call `sumFunConstraint()`.
6. `sumFunConstraint()` (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl, lines 124-138) calls `buildSumExpr()` with the part category's empty part list, producing an expression with zero terms. The `ComparisonOperator.applyConstraint` then creates a solver constraint like `0 == leftValue` or `0 >= leftValue`, which may be unsatisfiable.

If there is no `comparator` set, `setPartCategoryInput()` returns early and no error occurs -- the solver will simply produce trivially satisfiable results (any matching solution) since there are no parts to constrain.

---

### 5. `ModuleInst` Error Fields and `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()`

**`ModuleInst`:**

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/cmodel/ModuleInst.java`
- This class has **no error-specific fields**. It extends `ModuleBaseInst` and contains:
  - `id` (Long), `instanceConfigId`, `quantity`, `partCategorys` (List), `priorityAttrValues`, `prioritySortNo`, `priorityOverallValue`
  - No `error`, `errorMessage`, or `status` fields.

**`ModuleBaseInst`:**

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/cmodel/ModuleBaseInst.java`
- Also has **no error fields**. Contains: `instanceId`, `code`, `paras`, `parts`, `extAttrs`, `shortCode`.

**How `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()` reports errors:**

- **File:** `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/SolutionUtils.java`
- **Lines 38-91**

The method receives a `Result<List<ModuleInst>> result` parameter. It prints a "3.Messages:" section (line 86-89) that simply prints `result.getMessage()`, which contains whatever message string was set on the Result:

```java
sb.append("3.Messages:").append(System.lineSeparator());
if (result != null) {
    sb.append(result.getMessage()).append(System.lineSeparator());
}
```

The `Result` class (at `d:/03.code4ccds/jmixconfigengine/src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/model/Result.java`) has three status codes:
- `SUCCESS = 0`
- `FAILED = 1`
- `NO_SOLUTION = 2`

The `message` field on `Result` carries the error text (e.g., "Priority-filtered aparts: {} by {condition}", "no solution", "Failed to process Module constraint: ...", etc.). `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()` does NOT distinguish between result codes -- it always prints the message if it is non-null. The caller must check `result.getCode()` separately.

Error information flows through `Result.code` and `Result.message`, NOT through `ModuleInst` fields. `ModuleInst` has no error-bearing fields at all.

---

### Summary of Key Files and Lines

| File | Key Lines | Role |
|------|-----------|------|
| `.../executor/impl/ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java` | 172-241 (`filterClone`), 194-198 (throw on empty), 166-169 (catch) | Entry A: throws `AlgExecutorException` on empty filter |
| `.../executor/impl/PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.java` | 39-91 (`doProcess`), 61-63 (noSolution on empty) | Entry B: returns `Result.noSolution()` on empty filter |
| `.../executor/bmodel/PartCategory.java` | 109-131 (`filterClone`), 133-185 (`querySubAtomicParts`) | Core filtering logic |
| `.../executor/impl/util/FilterExpressionExecutor.java` | 111-121, 131-152 (`doSelect`) | Filter expression evaluation; returns empty `ArrayList` when no match |
| `.../executor/impl/algmodel/ModuleAlgImpl.java` | 205-243 (`initData`) | Orchestrates PartCategoryAlgImpl creation |
| `.../executor/impl/algmodel/ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java` | 328-347 (`initAll`), 657-669 (`initData`) | Creates PartVar/ParaVar; silently handles empty atomic parts |
| `.../executor/impl/algmodel/SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl.java` | 43-48 (`initData`), 51-56 (`initInput`), 124-138 (`sumFunConstraint`) | Single-instance algorithm; builds sum expression from (possibly empty) parts |
| `.../executor/impl/ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl.java` | 259-266 (`toPartCategoryInput`) | Wraps filteredCategory into PartCategoryInput without validating emptiness |
| `.../executor/cmodel/ModuleInst.java` | 1-235 | No error fields |
| `.../executor/model/Result.java` | 1-105 | `code` (0/1/2), `message` -- the only error channel |
| `.../executor/impl/SolutionUtils.java` | 38-91 (`printSolutions`) | Prints `result.getMessage()` in "3.Messages:" section |

_**Agent (deepseek-v4-pro 2026-04-29 22:40:19Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a very thorough understanding of the current filtering flow. Let me summarize the problem and design the RFC document.

**Current Problem:**
1. When `filterClone()` in `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl` finds no matching parts for a PartCategory, it throws `AlgExecutorException`, which causes the entire solve to fail with `Result.failed()`.
2. Other PartCategories that DO have matching parts get no solutions returned.
3. There's no mechanism to report which PartCategory had the problem and why.

**Desired Behavior:**
1. When a filter for PartCategory A finds no matching parts, report an error on that PartCategory's instance.
2. Continue processing other PartCategories (B, C) that DO have matching parts.
3. Return solutions for the valid PartCategories, with error info on the failed ones.

Now let me write the RFC document following the Rust RFC format and referencing the project's conventions.
</details></think>

Now I have a thorough understanding of the code flow. Let me write the RFC document.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# RFC-0002: 部件分类过滤为空时的处理

> 状态：草案（Draft）
> 日期：2026-04-30

---

## 1. 摘要

本RFC提议优化部件分类过滤为空时的处理逻辑。当某个 PartCategory 根据输入的过滤条件找不到匹配部件时，不应导致整体求解失败，而应在该分类对应的 Instance 上输出错误信息，同时继续处理其他满足条件的部件分类并返回有效解。

---

## 2. 动机

### 2.1 问题背景

当前处理流程分为两步：

1. 根据 `PartConstraintReq` 中的过滤条件（`attrWhereCondition`）对 PartCategory 进行过滤
2. 基于过滤后的部件构建约束表达式并求解

**存在的问题**：如果第1步过滤后没有匹配的部件，第2步构建约束表达式时：
- 如果该部件分类与其他部件分类存在关联规则（如 `inCompatible`、`sumFunConstraint`），会导致整体求解失败（返回 `INFEASIBLE` 或 `FAILED`）
- 即使其他部件分类（如 CPU）能正常求解，用户也**得不到任何有效信息**——既不返回部分有效解，也不提示是哪个分类的哪个过滤条件导致了问题

### 2.2 问题场景

**场景**：用户输入两个部件约束请求：
\```
drive:  Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400   ← Speed=5400 能找到匹配部件 ✓
cpu:    Sum_Memory >=512 where CoreNum=4    ← CoreNum=4 找不到任何匹配部件 ✗
\```

**当前行为**：
- `filterClone` 在 cpu 分类上过滤为空 → 抛出 `AlgExecutorException`
- 整体返回 `Result.failed("...")` — **两个分类的结果都丢失了**

**期望行为**：
- drive 分类正常求解，返回有效解
- cpu 分类的 Instance 上标记 `error`，提示 "根据条件 CoreNum=4 未找到匹配部件"
- 用户能同时看到成功的结果和失败的原因

### 2.3 代码现状

当前 `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone()` 中（行 194-198）：

\```java
if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
}
\```

一旦某个 PartCategory 过滤为空，直接抛出异常，阻断所有后续处理。

而 `PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.doProcess()` 中（行 61-63）：

\```java
if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    return Result.noSolution(msg);
}
\```

返回 `noSolution` 但同样不区分是哪个分类失败，也不返回其他分类的有效结果。

---

## 3. 设计方案

### 3.1 核心思路

将"过滤为空"从**致命错误**降级为**可恢复的局部错误**：
- 过滤为空的 PartCategory 不参与约束构建
- 在其对应的 `ModuleInst` / `PartCategoryInst` 上记录错误信息
- 其他正常过滤的 PartCategory 继续走原有流程
- 最终结果中同时包含有效解和错误信息

### 3.2 数据模型扩展

#### 3.2.1 ModuleInst 增加 errorMap

\```java
public class ModuleInst extends ModuleBaseInst {
    // ... 现有字段 ...

    /**
     * 部件分类级别的错误信息，key = partCategoryCode
     * 记录该分类过滤或求解过程中的问题
     */
    private Map<String, String> errorMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
}
\```

#### 3.2.2 PartCategoryInst 增加 error 字段

\```java
public class PartCategoryInst {
    // ... 现有字段 ...

    /** 该分类实例的错误信息，null 表示无错误 */
    private String error;
}
\```

### 3.3 处理流程改造

\```
filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap)
        │
        ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  遍历每个 PartCategory                                    │
│    ├── 过滤有匹配部件 → 正常创建 PartCategoryInput         │
│    └── 过滤为空        → 创建 ErrorPartCategoryInput        │
│                          (标记 skip=true, error=msg)      │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        │
        ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ModuleAlgImpl.initData()                                 │
│    ├── 正常 PartCategoryInput → 创建 PartCategoryAlgImpl  │
│    └── ErrorPartCategoryInput  → 跳过，不创建 AlgImpl     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
        │
        ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  求解完成后                                                │
│    遍历 errorInputs，将错误信息写入 ModuleInst.errorMap     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
\```

### 3.4 关键实现

#### 3.4.1 ErrorPartCategoryInput

新增标记类，用于区分正常输入和错误输入：

\```java
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class ErrorPartCategoryInput extends PartCategoryInputBase {

    /** 原始部件约束请求（用于追溯错误原因） */
    private PartConstraintReq orgReq;

    /** 错误消息 */
    private String errorMessage;

    @Override
    public String getPartCategoryCode() {
        return orgReq != null ? orgReq.getPartCategoryCode() : "";
    }

    /** 是否为错误输入（跳过约束构建） */
    public boolean isError() {
        return true;
    }
}
\```

#### 3.4.2 filterClone 改造

\```java
// 当前：过滤为空时抛异常
if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
}

// 改造后：过滤为空时创建 ErrorPartCategoryInput
if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
    ErrorPartCategoryInput errorInput = new ErrorPartCategoryInput();
    errorInput.setOrgReq(req);
    errorInput.setErrorMessage(
        String.format("No parts found for condition: %s",
            req.getAttrWhereCondition()));
    errorInputs.add(errorInput);   // 收集错误输入
    continue;                       // 跳过此分类，继续处理其他
}
\```

#### 3.4.3 ModuleAlgImpl.initData() 改造

\```java
for (PartCategory partCategory : bModule.getPartCategorys()) {
    PartCategoryInputBase input = partConstraintFromReqMap.get(categoryCode);
    if (input instanceof ErrorPartCategoryInput) {
        // 跳过错误输入，不创建 AlgImpl
        continue;
    }
    // ... 正常流程 ...
}
\```

#### 3.4.4 错误信息写入结果

\```java
// 求解完成后
for (ErrorPartCategoryInput errorInput : errorInputs) {
    for (ModuleInst solution : solutions) {
        solution.getErrorMap().put(
            errorInput.getPartCategoryCode(),
            errorInput.getErrorMessage());
    }
}
\```

### 3.5 关联规则兼容处理

当过滤为空的 PartCategory 与其他分类存在关联规则时：

| 规则类型 | 处理方式 |
|----------|----------|
| `inCompatible(A, B)` | 若 A 过滤为空，则 A 的所有部件都不选中 → B 侧约束解除 |
| `sumFunConstraint` | 过滤为空的分类不参与求和，仅用有效分类构建表达式 |
| `PriorityRule` 跨分类引用 | 警告日志，跳过该分类的权重项 |

---

## 4. 验收准则

### 4.1 功能验收用例

#### ERR-001：单个分类过滤为空

**目的**：验证单个 PartCategory 过滤为空时，不阻断整体求解，且错误信息正确返回。

**测试数据（极简）**：
\```java
@PartAnno(code = "cpu")
private PartCategoryVar cpu;

@PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"4"}, price = 100)
private PartVar cpu4;

@PartAnno(code = "drive")
private PartCategoryVar drive;

@PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400", "1"})
private PartVar drive1;
\```

**测试用例**：

| ID | 过滤条件 | 预期行为 |
|----|----------|----------|
| ERR-001-1 | cpu: where CoreNum=8, drive: where Speed=5400 | cpu 过滤为空 → ModuleInst.errorMap["cpu"] 有错误信息；drive 正常返回解 |
| ERR-001-2 | cpu: where CoreNum=4, drive: where Speed=7200 | drive 过滤为空 → ModuleInst.errorMap["drive"] 有错误信息；cpu 正常返回解 |
| ERR-001-3 | cpu: where CoreNum=4, drive: where Speed=5400 | 两个都匹配 → 正常返回，errorMap 为空 |

**验证逻辑**：
- `result.getCode() == Result.SUCCESS`（或新增 `PARTIAL_SUCCESS`）
- `solutions.get(0).getErrorMap().get("cpu")` 包含错误信息
- `solutions` 中仍有 drive 的有效配置

#### ERR-002：两个分类都过滤为空

**目的**：验证所有分类都过滤为空时的行为。

**测试用例**：

| ID | 过滤条件 | 预期行为 |
|----|----------|----------|
| ERR-002-1 | cpu: where CoreNum=8, drive: where Speed=7200 | 两个都为空 → 返回空解列表，errorMap 有两项 |

#### ERR-003：过滤为空的分类与其他分类有规则关联

**目的**：验证过滤为空的分类不影响其他分类的规则求解。

**测试数据（极简）**：
\```java
@PartAnno(code = "cpu")
private PartCategoryVar cpu;
// cpu4(CoreNum=4), cpu8(CoreNum=8)

@PartAnno(code = "drive")
private PartCategoryVar drive;
// drive1(Speed=5400)

@CodeRuleAnno()
private void rule1() {
    // cpu8 和 drive1 不兼容
    inCompatible("rule1", "cpu:CoreNum=8", "drive:Speed=5400");
}
\```

**测试用例**：

| ID | 输入 | 预期行为 |
|----|------|----------|
| ERR-003-1 | cpu: where CoreNum=8, drive: | cpu 过滤找到 cpu8 → 与 drive1 不兼容 → 正常约束求解 |

---

### 4.2 边界条件

| 条件 | 输入 | 预期行为 |
|------|------|----------|
| 过滤条件为空字符串 | `where ` | 不过滤，返回所有部件（同现有行为） |
| 分类代码不存在 | `nonexist: where X=Y` | 忽略，不产生错误 |
| 混合场景（1空 + 1有效 + 1无过滤） | 三个分类 | 空的产生错误，有效/无过滤正常 |

### 4.3 回归测试

- 现有所有测试用例行为不变
- `printSolutions()` 输出中增加 errorMap 的展示

---

## 5. 实现计划

| 阶段 | 任务 | 优先级 |
|------|------|--------|
| 1 | `ModuleInst` 增加 `errorMap` 字段 | P0 |
| 2 | 创建 `ErrorPartCategoryInput` 类 | P0 |
| 3 | 改造 `filterClone` 不再抛异常，改为收集错误输入 | P0 |
| 4 | 改造 `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` 跳过错误输入 | P0 |
| 5 | 求解完成后将错误信息写入 `ModuleInst.errorMap` | P0 |
| 6 | `SolutionUtils.printSolutions()` 展示 errorMap | P1 |
| 7 | 编写单元测试 ERR-001 ~ ERR-003 | P1 |
| 8 | 回归测试 | P1 |

---

## 6. 参考资料

- Google OR-Tools CP-SAT
- Rust RFC Format: https://github.com/rust-lang/rfcs
- JMix CORE-DESIGN.md
- JMix ACCEPTANCE.md

```

```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (deepseek-v4-pro 2026-04-29 22:41:44Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I've written the draft RFC document. Now let me present it to the user and ask my questions. Let me re-read what I wrote and formulate my questions.

My questions:
1. About the error return code - should I introduce a new `Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS` code, or use `Result.SUCCESS` with a non-empty errorMap?
2. About the `ErrorPartCategoryInput` - should I put it in the `impl` package or model package?
3. About the `PartCategoryInst.error` field - is it needed, or is `ModuleInst.errorMap` sufficient?
4. About the relationship with the decision strategy feature - how do these interact when both are used on the same PartConstraintReq?
</details></think>

_**Agent (deepseek-v4-pro 2026-04-29 22:41:52Z)**_

以下是我的疑问：

**Q1：返回码设计**。当部分分类过滤为空、部分正常时，应该用什么 `Result.code`？
- 方案A：复用 `Result.SUCCESS`，靠 `errorMap` 非空来判断有部分失败
- 方案B：新增 `Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS = 3`，明确表达"部分成功"

**Q2：ErrorPartCategoryInput 放哪里？** 按对称设计模式，`PartCategoryInput` / `PartCategoryInputBase` 都在 `impl` 包下。`ErrorPartCategoryInput` 是否也放在 `impl` 包，还是放在 `model` 包？

**Q3：PartCategoryInst 要不要加 error 字段？** 当前设计是把错误放在 `ModuleInst.errorMap`（key=categoryCode）。多实例场景下，不同实例可能有不同的过滤条件，是否需要细化到 `PartCategoryInst` 级别？

**Q4：和 DecisionStrategy 的关系**。一个 `PartConstraintReq` 上可能同时有过滤条件和决策策略。如果过滤为空，策略自然跳过——但需要在 errorMap 中体现吗？还是只需报告过滤失败即可？

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user gave me clear answers. Let me address each:

Q1: Use `Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS = 3` — I need to add this new status code.

Q2: The user says I misunderstood. The input doesn't change — the `PartConstraintReq` is the same. The issue is only about the OUTPUT. There's no need for an `ErrorPartCategoryInput` class. The filtering flow stays the same, but instead of throwing an exception when filtering finds nothing, we:
- Record the error for that PartCategory
- Continue processing other PartCategorys
- The error info goes into the output (ModuleInst/PartCategoryInst)

So I DON'T need a new input class. I need to change the `filterClone` in `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl` to NOT throw when filtering is empty, but instead record the error. The `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` needs to handle the case where a PartCategoryInput has an empty filteredCategory (no parts).

Q3: The user confirms I need to add error to the output model, but wants:
- Error code constants (like `FILTER_EMPTY`, etc.)
- Error message field for detailed info
- Per-instance level error (not just per-category), because in multi-instance scenarios, instance 0 might find parts while instance 1 might not.

Q4: Just report filter failure, no need to mention strategy.

Let me revise the RFC document based on these answers.

Key changes:
1. Add `Result.PARTIAL_SUCCESS = 3`
2. No new input class — just change the filterClone behavior to not throw, but mark the PartCategoryInput as "empty" (or create a default/empty one)
3. Add error to PartCategoryInst with errorCode constants and errorMessage
4. Multi-instance: each instance independently reports its filtering result

Let me also think about how to implement this cleanly. The flow would be:

1. `filterClone` in `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl`: when filtering finds no parts, instead of throwing, create a PartCategoryInput with an empty filteredCategory and set an error flag/message on it
2. `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()`: when it encounters a PartCategoryInput with empty parts, skip creating the AlgImpl and record the error
3. After solving, propagate errors to the output

Actually, wait. Let me re-think Q2 more carefully. The user said "输入是没有变的" (the input hasn't changed). This means the existing `PartCategoryInput`/`PartCategoryInputBase` classes don't need modification. The change is only in:

1. How `filterClone` handles the empty case (don't throw, create a PartCategoryInput with empty filteredCategory)
2. How `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` handles an empty PartCategoryInput (skip it, record error)
3. How the OUTPUT (ModuleInst/PartCategoryInst) carries error info

So actually, I don't need an `ErrorPartCategoryInput`. I just need to:
- In `filterClone`: when empty, still create a PartCategoryInput but with the empty filteredCategory, AND store an error message somewhere accessible
- OR: in `filterClone`: when empty, don't create a PartCategoryInput at all, but record the error in a separate map that gets propagated to the output

Hmm, but the `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()` iterates over the module's PartCategorys and looks up corresponding PartCategoryInputs. If a PartCategory has no matching PartCategoryInput (because filtering was empty), it needs to be handled.

Looking at the current flow more carefully:
- When `filterClone` finds no parts, it currently throws. If we change it to NOT throw, the flow continues.
- The `PartCategoryInput` with empty filteredCategory would still be passed to `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()`
- In `initData()`, the `SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl` would be initialized with an empty PartCategory
- `initAll()` would create zero PartVars
- Then `initInput()` might fail because there are no parts

The cleanest approach might be:
1. In `filterClone`, when filtering finds no parts: create a PartCategoryInput with the empty filteredCategory, AND mark it somehow (maybe via a flag or by checking if filteredCategory has no parts)
2. In `ModuleAlgImpl.initData()`, check if the PartCategoryInput has an empty filteredCategory: if so, skip creating the AlgImpl and record the error
3. After the solve completes, propagate the errors to the output

Let me update the RFC.
